programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Michelle and Bernard love the Italian city of Lucca, with its Tuscan charm and beautiful countryside, and want their own holiday home there. Ben Hillman shows them what their £75k can buy.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Manuel and his son Marvyn are looking for the perfect holiday home in Alicante for their whole family to enjoy. Can Leah Charles-King deliver the dream with their £130k budget?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Rooman and Richard dream of buying a holiday bolthole in sunny Fuengirola for quick getaways whenever they get the chance. Can Jean Johansson find them the one for their budget of £130k?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Colchester. The first host, salesman Richard Massey, is banking on his signature dish of 'drunken duck' and his cheeky-chappy humour to bag him the prize. (Ep1/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Colchester. Smooth-talking PR man Darius rustles up a menu of local produce, including his own blackberry wine. But will his 'Roman Colchester' dress code be a hit? (Ep2/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Colchester. American army wife Adrena offers her guests an Armenian menu to reflect her heritage, and plans an Armenian egg fight for her guests' entertainment. (Ep3/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Colchester. IT consultant James Coe's sophisticated food is a hit from the get-go. But his constant chat about money is hard to stomach. (Ep4/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Colchester. It's the final day of the competition and vegetarian Jodie is out to wow her guests by giving them what they want: meat! If she can work up the courage to touch it... (Ep5/5)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Joe and Kirsty want to swap their Hampshire house for a forever home in the warmer climes of inland Valencia in Spain. Can Jean Johansson deliver their dream place for £280,000?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Dan and Nina want to build a unique family home, but their plot is dominated by a pond filled with local drainage. Will their West Sussex house be sublime and sleek or a Shrek-like swamp?

programme.title: Poisoned: Killer in the Post
programme.desc: The investigation into a British man's death leads to a dark online world of suicide sites and the pursuit of a man selling lethal poison to hundreds of young people. (Ep1/2)

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody

programme.title: Mona Lisa's Smile
programme.desc: In 1953, an Art History teacher at a girls' school tries to broaden the narrow horizons of her brilliant students. The biggest challenge will be to make students find (and assume) their cultural identity, starting from a broad and challenging vision of new knowledge.

programme.desc: As Sandokan heads to the Sultan's antimony mines to plunder them, Brooke pursues him relentlessly, with the help of Sergeant Murray.

programme.title: Purple like the sea
programme.desc: Viola Vitale, Miss Italy and fashion journalist, returns to Sicily to look for her father. He starts working for a digital news company and teams up with police inspector Francesco Demir to solve crimes with the help of synesthesia.

programme.title: The Wrong Man (VO)
programme.desc: Rich restaurant owner Özgür prefers casual encounters to serious relationships. Ezgi wants to get married, but ends up being used by men. Özgür agrees to give him dating tips so that his next relationship with Serdar will work out.

programme.title: Room 309 (VO)

programme.title: Fallen Angels Club: Heroes and Villains
programme.desc: Members of the Fallen Angels Murder Club search for answers about the mysterious death of one of their own. Hollis finds himself at the center of the investigation when a journalist covering the case also turns up dead.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit

programme.title: Professor Baldas
programme.desc: After being abandoned by her fiancé shortly before her wedding, teacher Elizabeth Halsey is determined to find a replacement who will support her whims and allow her to stop doing what she hates most in life: teaching.

programme.title: An English Estate
programme.desc: Los Angeles. Promising architect Nora Cartwright's life is about to change. First, she realizes that both her boyfriend Daniel and she are too engaged in their respective careers to be available for a relationship and ends up breaking up.

programme.title: Butter
programme.desc: Laura Pickler enjoys the privilege of being the sidekick to Iowa's state butter carving champion for 15 years. But this position is threatened with the arrival of an unlikely competitor: a 10-year-old girl, full of talent!

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Zeynep and Alihan argue over Yildiz's schemes, and Zeynep begins to see her sister differently.

programme.title: My Name Is Farah
programme.desc: Gönül is devastated by Alp's death. Alp's mother accuses Mehmet of not protecting Alp. Mehmet is furious when he sees Tahir leaving the police station.

programme.title: My Name Is Farah
programme.desc: Memhet tries to contain his frustration with the development of the case, when they realize that the entire murder site was cleaned very well. Farah falls asleep on the bus and the result is disastrous.

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Heartbroken and disillusioned, young Dr Ruby Walker leaves her life in the UK for a fresh start in exotic south India. But when she arrives at “Good Karma Hospital”, nothing is as she expected, especially her new and eccentric boss Lydia Fonseca.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: Tina and her friends organize a plan to convince Paolo to write a song for the singing competition.

programme.title: The Prince of Tides
programme.desc: After the suicide attempt of her twin sister, Savannah - a New York writer -, Tom appears to take action against her. It is then that he meets Susan Lowenstein, the psychiatrist who treats Savannah. But both twins have memories they prefer not to remember...

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: Songül does not allow Lale and Onur to meet. Soner and Songül decide to go for coffee. Lale and Onur meet in secret, but Songül sends Gülsah to keep them company. Lale and Onur meet again at night.

programme.title: Sandokan: The Pirate Prince
programme.desc: Sandokan and his men take refuge in Singapore, closely followed by Brooke and Murray. There, Marianne discovers another side of Sandokan, closer to its origins, and begins to get to know it better during the Lunar New Year celebrations.

programme.title: Purple like the sea
programme.desc: A new investigation reveals the body of Michele Acampora, killed while transporting a shipment of wine for the company Cannisi, of which he was one of the two partners.

programme.title: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Cansu gets stressed again with Levent, but decides to change his attitude. Özgür has a dream and is confused by his feelings. Serdar tells Yesim that Özgür is in love with her.

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: Songül does not allow Lale and Onur to meet. Soner and Songül decide to go for coffee. Lale and Onur meet in secret, but Songül sends Gülsah to keep them company. Lale and Onur meet again at night.

programme.title: Romeo + Juliet
programme.desc: In this adaptation by Baz Luhrmann, William Shakespeare's classic love story moves from the Middle Ages to the futuristic city of Verona Beach. There, Romeo and Juliet fall in love and experience the love of a lifetime.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: While Yildiz and Ender prepare a new trap for Leyla, Sahika begins to manipulate her to bring her closer to Halit. At the same time, family tensions rise with Zerrin's return.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Glassman develops a new procedure to treat a young man's severely deformed spine, while Shaun and Morgan argue about what to do when a comatose patient regains consciousness.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: When a reputable surgeon comes to receive treatment at St. Bonaventure, the staff's enthusiasm is quickly overshadowed by the doctor's behavior. Shaun and Lea are forced to make a defining decision that will change the course of their relationship.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: While Yildiz and Ender prepare a new trap for Leyla, Sahika begins to manipulate her to bring her closer to Halit. At the same time, family tensions rise with Zerrin's return.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: While Yildiz receives an unexpected offer to work on television, Leyla gains more and more ground with Halit. At the same time, the dinner organized by Lila brings together two conflicting families.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: Jerry Maguire was your typical sports agent. Willing to practically anything to get the best possible contract for his clients and the best commission for himself. Until the day he decides to question everything he does. Oscar® winner in 1997.

programme.title: Romance to the rescue
programme.desc: To impress a potential love interest, Kyra enters her dog in an agility contest. The problem is that she doesn't have a dog, so she needs to find (and train) one, and quickly.

programme.title: Terminator Salvation
programme.desc: Year 2018. Judgment Day has passed and has devastated modern civilization. An army of Terminators roams the Earth to capture and kill all those humans who have survived. The few that remain have organized themselves and hide in bunkers creating what they call "The Resistance" to combat the robots when they have the chance even though they are outnumbered. The Terminators are controlled by Skynet, an artificial intelligence network that was created 14 years earlier by the government, but which turned against them, and which wants to cause nuclear annihilation. Only one man can stop it, John Connor. He has been taught his entire life for this moment by his mother, Sarah Connor, who already knew what was going to happen, but something that was not in her plans makes him doubt what he has known so far. The appearance of Marcus Wright, a stranger who comes from the past and whose last memory is of being on death row, and who also insists on having been with Kyle Reese, John's father. What John does not know is that Marcus, in 2003, had donated his organs and brain to the Cyberdyne company before being executed, and that with this they created a special Terminator who was left with his heart and biological brain. John must decide whether to trust Marcus as the Resistance prepares its final attack on the Terminators, which will take place at Skynet's base of operations.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: Sweet Molly Wright has a life-changing experience as a child; Help an alien who is being sought by two agents of the MiB organization escape. Twenty years after what happened, and after much physical and intellectual preparation, she manages to present herself as a candidate to join the CIA and the FBI, but no one believes her story and she is rejected for her delusions with alien life. Despite this, Molly does not give up and manages to track down an alien landing that leads her directly to the MiB headquarters in New York City. His adventure begins from that moment, he leaves life as he knows it behind and becomes a testing agent for the MiB branch in the city of London. The tenacious and cunning Molly has to prove her abilities to stay in the MiB. To do this, he manages to get involved in a difficult mission as the assistant of the presumptuous Agent H. Both agents will have to iron out their rough edges and work as a team to solve two serious problems; the appearance of a mole that would call into question the impeccable reputation of the MiB and the threat of two alien beings that endangers life on Earth and the balance of the universe. Men in Black: International is a new installment of the famous Men in Black franchise. It becomes the fourth film and spin-off of the original MIB saga. It stars Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson and much of its filming took place in the cities of New York, Morocco, Italy and London. The actor and producer Felix Gary Gray was in charge of directing this film.

According to the Mayan calendar, the year 2012 is set as the date of the end of the world. This end of the world will bring different natural disasters, volcanoes will erupt, there will be major floods, typhoons... Jackson Curtis (John Cusack) is a writer of science fiction stories who also works as a driver for a Russian millionaire. Jackson is divorced and has two children, Lilly (Morgan Lily) and Noah (Liam James) who live with his ex-wife's boyfriend. One day, when Jackson and his children return home they find that great seismic activity is affecting the entire West Coast of the United States. Suddenly the Curtis family will find themselves immersed in a fight to survive what could be the end of the world. Actor John Cusack, known for his performance in films such as '1408' (2007), 'High Fidelity' (2000) and 'How to Be John Malkovich' (1999), stars in this feature film about the consequences of the end of the world that the Mayans predicted would happen in 2012. Its director, Roland Emmerich, specialized in action films and apocalyptic and disaster films, confirmed the film's completion. of a television series, a sequel to the feature film, which would be based on the survivors of the disaster. An alternative ending to the film was also included in some versions of the DVD marketed in different countries. For its promotion, a trailer was used in which you could see how a tsunami threatened the Himalayas, ending with the phrase 'The governments of the world did not prepare the people for the end of the world, find out the truth.' The page of the fictitious organization 'Institute for Human Continuity' was also launched, thus beginning an important viral marketing strategy.

programme.title: Cross-fire
programme.desc: After witnessing the brutal murder of a store owner and his son, firefighter Jeremy Coleman miraculously escapes with his life. Having witnessed the murders and being forced to testify against the gang of gangsters that carried them out, specifically against their leader, David Hagan, he is integrated into the witness protection program under the supervision of the Marshalls. Agent Talia will be in charge of protecting Jeremy's life from this cruel murderer. Inspector Mike Calla will be in charge of handling Coleman's case, a man who precisely lost his wife at the hands of the same gangster who committed this crime, and who since then has not stopped searching for him to do justice. The problem comes when Jeremy Coleman's new identity is compromised, so the firefighter is forced to take action to recover his life and save those of his loved ones.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The Ghostbusters discover that New York is once again headed toward supernatural disaster, with a river of ectoplasmic matter running beneath the city and an old sorcerer attempting to take possession of a baby. to be born again.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Texas. Two years before the American Civil War breaks out. King Schultz is a German bounty hunter who is tracking murderers to collect for their heads, and he promises the black slave Django to set him free on the condition that he helps him catch them. Django accepts, since his greatest wish is to go rescue his wife Broomhilda, a slave who is on the plantation of landowner Calvin Candie. This film, written and directed by Quentin Tarantino, is a western film with references to the spaghetti western genre; genre through which I wanted to portray a story about slavery like this one. Tarantino is a renowned American director, producer and screenwriter whose films are characterized by addressing non-linear stories, violence, Grindhouse influences, kung fu and spaghetti westerns. Starring Jamie Foxx ('Bait', 'Collateral'), Christoph Waltz ('Inglourious Basterds', 'Dorian'), Leonardo DiCaprio ('Titanic', 'The Great Gatsby') and Samuel L. Jackson ('S.W.A.T.', 'Star Wars'); The film is a mix of good dialogue, rhythm, irony, and an impeccable soundtrack that captures the viewer's attention at all times.

programme.title: damn bastards
programme.desc: With France occupied by the Nazis, a young Jewish woman witnesses the cruel murder of her parents by the expert Jew hunter Colonel Hans Landa. Barely escaping to save her life, she begins to plot revenge when years later a German war hero becomes interested in her and decides to premiere a film dedicated to her in his theater, which will be attended by great Nazi officers. This premiere catches the attention of "The Bastards", a group of Jewish-American soldiers led by Captain Aldo Raine. When the plans of this group of ruthless avengers and the young Jewish girl's conspiracy are put into motion, their paths will meet during an afternoon that will forever change the course of history. Although 30% of the film is originally spoken in English, the predominant languages ​​throughout the film are French and German, and a bit of Italian. In chapter three of the film "German Night in Paris" there is not a single sentence in English, something totally unusual in a Hollywood production.

programme.title: The source of life
programme.desc: An odyssey about a man's fight to save the woman he loves in three time spaces: the 21st century, the conquest of America, and the future.

programme.title: Men in Black: The men in black
programme.desc: The Men in Black are agents who work for the government on a secret mission that consists of monitoring aliens living on our planet without us knowing. James Edwards (Will Smith), a police officer, and Agent K (Tommy Lee Jones), one of the Men in Black, discover that an alien terrorist intends to destroy Earth. James and Agent K will try to destroy these aliens and prevent humanity from being destroyed. In this film, Barry Sonnenfeld adapts the story of the same name by Lowell Cunningham, which refers to these supposed men in charge of hiding the existence of extraterrestrial life in various conspiracy theories. Sonnenfeld is known for films such as "Wild Wild West" (1999) and "The Adams Family" (1991). He began working for the Coen brothers as a director of photography but soon began making his own films. Originally "Men in Black" was offered to director Quentin Tarantino, who declined to participate in the project, as did Clint Eastwood, who was offered the role of Agent K. The film has several sequels directed by Sonnenfeld. The first feature film in the saga received positive reviews, something that the second installment did not achieve despite all of them being a great success at the box office. The film has three Oscar nominations, from which it won a statuette, and was also nominated for the Golden Gobles. The music, composed by Danny Elfman, caused the film "Men in Black" to be included in the American Film Institute's "100 Years&100 songs" list.

programme.title: I continue like God
programme.desc: Popular Buffalo reporter Evan Baxter has just become a congressman, so he moves with his family to a luxurious development in Huntsville, Virginia. Everything seems to be going well for the Baxter family, who are focused on adjusting to their new luxury-filled life away from their hometown. Evan is expectant since in his first days as a congressman, the powerful Congressman Long proposes that he work together with his team in the development of a bill, which makes him think that God has heard his prayers and that professional success has finally knocked on his door. However, Evan's future begins to falter when one day a man who calls himself God appears at his house and entrusts him with an important mission of biblical proportions: build an ark to save a pair of each animal species and thus save humanity from the approaching universal flood. Even though Evan is skeptical and considers the man crazy, when pairs of all kinds of animals begin to arrive in his garden and different suppliers begin to knock on his door bringing enormous quantities of wood and other materials, Evan is forced to believe in God and forcibly accept the order. Resigned and with the help of his three children and the manual 'Build Arks for Dummies', Evan begins his important task. During the process, many will consider Evan crazy and begin to call him 'The Noah of New York' as he will undergo a significant transformation, both physically and mentally.

programme.title: Duplicity
programme.desc: MI6 agent Ray Koval (Clive Owen) is in Dubai when he meets Claire Stenwick (Julia Roberts). After groping her a little, he manages to win her over and they spend the night together, without knowing that Claire is part of the CIA. When Ray wakes up the next day, the woman has disappeared with several compromised documents. For years, Ray searches for her, leaves his job at MI6 and gets a new one in the espionage department of a large multinational. In his third week of work he meets Claire again. Now they both work as spies for large companies and Claire is not willing to allow anyone to come and destroy the professional future she has been building for just over a year. The two spies will use all kinds of tricks to keep their positions, but they will also have to fight against the great attraction they feel for each other so as not to succumb to the other person's deceptions. In this film, actor Clive Owen plays MI6 spy Ray Koval. Owen began his career in television, working mainly on not very well-known series. Currently, although he still makes some stellar appearances on television, he is one of the best-known faces on the big screen. He has worked in films such as 'The Bourne Affair', 'King Arthur' and 'Closer' where he shares the bill for the first time with actress Julia Roberts. In 'Duplicity', Roberts plays Claire Stenwick, a retired CIA agent. The acclaimed actress began her career in 1987, in the series 'The History of Crime'. After that she worked in several films until she became famous with 'Pretty Woman' and her starring role alongside actor Richard Gere. From there her career took off and her charming smile made her 'America's Sweetheart'. He played several leading roles in romantic comedies but he has always tried to combine it with more serious roles such as those he played in 'Stay by me' or 'Erin Brockovich'.

programme.title: Demolition
programme.desc: A successful executive struggles to understand his emotional disconnection after the sudden and tragic death of his wife in a car accident. Despite his father-in-law's pressure to recover, Davis remains bewildered and reflects this by compulsively disassembling increasingly conspicuous objects around him.

programme.title: big kids 2
programme.desc: After the pleasant experience he had three summers ago, Lenny (Adam Sandler) decides to move with his family to his hometown, where he hopes to raise his children just as he was raised. His best friends are waiting for him there, who also live there with their families. But the four friends, reunited again, cannot stay for long without getting into trouble. And what was expected to be a change for the better in the lives of their children ends up becoming an opportunity for parents to live new and exciting adventures. Together they will face the new bullies in town, reconnect with the old ones, and be victims of harassment from all the people who meant something to them in primary school. Second part of the comedy of the same name released in 2010, starring four of the best-known comic faces on the international scene and in North American cinema: Adam Sandler ('Dad Cool', 'Billy Madison'), Kevin James ('The King of Queens', 'Hitch'), Chris Rock ('From Incompetent to President') and David Spade ('Give Me a Break', 'Rules of Engagement'). This is the first sequel filmed by actor Adam Sandler, he also wrote the script for this film and the first part. He wrote both scripts with Fred Wolf, one of the writers of the comedy show 'Saturday Night Live'.

programme.title: Together and mixed up
programme.desc: Jim and Lauren have a disastrous blind date and decide not to see each other again. Together with their respective children, the unique couple separately books an idyllic vacation at a luxurious resort dedicated to safaris in Africa. Without knowing they were going to meet, Lauren and Jim end up spending more time together than they imagined.

programme.title: The President and Miss Wade
programme.desc: Andrew Shepherd (Michael Douglas), president of the United States and widower for just over a year, begins a romance with Sydney Wade (Annette Benning), a consultant for an important environmental organization. This relationship, in the middle of the election campaign, will be taken advantage of by Bob Rumson (Richard Dreyfuss), the opposing candidate, to attack the president.

programme.title: A town called Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Harry Dalton (Pierce Brosnan) is one of the most renowned volcanologists at the United States Geological Survey. Four years after his partner's death during a volcanic eruption in Colombia, Harry receives a call from his boss, Paul Dyfrus (Charles Hallahan), to discuss the unusual behavior of a hitherto dormant volcano. Meanwhile, the city of Dante's Peak, located on one of the volcano's plains, is celebrating being named the second most desired place to live in the country. Harry begins his investigation in the area and discovers clear signs that the volcano could soon erupt. The scientist wants to put the city on alert, but the inhabitants have economic interests that could be harmed if they heed Harry's warnings. Everyone ignores it until it's too late. The director, Roger Donaldson, was drawn to the project because he was once a geology student. Many of the film's special effects were done practically. The ash from the volcano was actually very fine shavings of newspaper. According to an interview with Donaldson, the camera that Harry Dalton uses during his investigation is actually owned by Pierce Brosnan. Initially the main role was going to be played by Michael Douglas. Most of the film's exteriors were shot in Wallas, Idaho. It was also filmed on Dante's Peak, adding certain details with digital technology.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2: El poder de Electro
programme.desc: Peter Parker leads a very busy life: he has to save the city from bad guys and also continue with his university life to take care of Gwen, although from a distance. Things get complicated when the villain Electro appears with a thirst for revenge. However, it won't be the only thing Peter has to face, as the return of an old friend, Harry Osborn, brings new clues about his past.

programme.title: extreme chase
programme.desc: John Triton is a Marine returning home after being discharged from the Iraq War. Already in the United States, he has to take action again when his wife is kidnapped by a bloodthirsty mafia gang led by the cruel Rome. With everything at stake, John will not stop until he completes his toughest and most important mission.

programme.title: Conan the destroyer
programme.desc: Queen Taramis entrusts Conan with a very dangerous mission: to accompany Princess Jehnna on a long journey for which she was born predestined. Their objective is to recover a jewel that is in the possession of a powerful sorcerer. If he succeeds, the queen promises that she will help him recover Valeria, his great love. But the monarch's intentions are very different since with the jewel she wants to bring an ancient god back to life.

programme.title: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: A very dangerous alien has escaped from the high-security prison on the Moon with the help of his exuberant admirer. The alien is called "Boris the Animal", a ruthless being that Agent K. captured in 1969 and whom they must face again. Unaware of Boris's escape, K. (Tommy Lee Jones) and J. (Will Smith) continue carrying out their work as M.I.B. agents. ridding the city of dangerous aliens or aliens with petty crimes. At the beginning of a new day, J. can't find his partner anywhere, but that's not the most worrying thing, no one at the agency seems to know of his existence. In his investigation he will realize that Boris has made a jump in time and has killed K. completely changing history and causing the Earth to be unprotected against an imminent alien attack. J. will have to travel back in time to recover his partner and save the future of the planet. Specifically, he will travel to the year 1969, when K. is still a young agent with a certain sense of humor. Together they will try to catch the evil Boris. To do this, they will have the intermittent and relative help of a character who is capable of seeing all the space-time lines of the Universe at every moment. The film began filming without a definitive script, so production was delayed due to all the rewrites that were done until it was completed. For the role of Boris, the participation of actor Sacha Baron Cohen, known for his leading roles in the films "Borat" and "The Dictator", was reconsidered. But in the end the role was awarded to Jemaine Clement. The makeup he wore to embody the alien took four and a half hours to apply each day of filming. Will Smith had his ups and downs with the film's director, Barry Sonnenfeld, because he wanted the person to play the role of the colonel's son to be his son, Jaden Smith, and not Cayen Martin, who ultimately got the role.

programme.title: Son of a Gun
programme.desc: Young JR is accused and imprisoned for a minor crime. When he enters prison he discovers the harshness of life in prison, but he will soon become the protégé of Brendan Lynch, one of the most dangerous prisoners in Australia. However, that protection will have a price and Lynch, along with his team, will have plans for JR when he is released from prison: help them with their escape plan.

programme.title: Red hot
programme.desc: Art Jeffries is an FBI agent with respect problems for his superiors. One day he is assigned to investigate the case of a missing boy, Simon, whose parents have been murdered. After finding him, he discovers that he is a nine-year-old autistic boy with a prodigious ability to reveal supposedly insurmountable government codes.

programme.title: Hitman
programme.desc: Agent 47 has been genetically engineered to become an effective and lethal hitman, working under instructions from a mysterious group known as 'The Organization'. However, when he finds himself involved in a political conspiracy that is beyond his understanding, he will turn against what he has known until now to try to find out who has set him up. While Interpol and the Russian army search for him throughout Europe, the murderer will have to face two new elements in his life: conscience and love.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Robert Trench, an undercover DEA agent, takes advantage of gunman Michael Stigman's idea of ​​robbing a bank to get a mob boss out. However, the plan turns out to be exceedingly satisfactory when they get much more money than anticipated and, in addition, Trench's forces do not block their exit. To complicate things a little more. Stigman turns out to be a Navy Intelligence agent who shoots Trench and takes all the money. Soon, a confusing loop will begin in which both forces of the American army will pursue both Trench and Sitgman in a corrupt and dirty plot to each keep the profits. And without anyone expecting it, both Trench and Sitgman discover that they have to work together to be able to survive their own bosses and assault groups and to finally emerge victorious. During the development of the film, Vince Vaughn was going to play Bobby and Owen Wilson was going to play Stig. Also, as a curiosity, in the film's trailer you can hear the song "Die by the drop" from 2010 by the band The Dead Weathers. This song had previously been used in the trailer for Contraband (2012), which also featured Mark Wahlberg and was directed by Baltasar Kormákur.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: The Edge
programme.desc: Second part of Charlie's Angels. Dylan, Natalie and Alex are sent by their boss on a new mission: locate a group of rings that have been stolen from the Department of Justice. This device allows its owner to know the list of people who are in the FBI's Witness Protection Program. When the first witnesses begin to appear dead, the Angels will have to use all their ingenuity to solve the case. An exceptional cameo can be seen in this film: one of the original Angels, Jaclyn Smith.

programme.title: The Blind Side (A possible dream)
programme.desc: A young homeless African-American finds refuge in a white family, who will support him in his desire to become an American football player. Based on true events, the film tells the story of Michael Oher (Quinton Aaron), a teenager who tries to survive on his own, practically "homeless" until Leigh Anne Tuohy (Sandra Bullock) finds him on the street. Upon discovering that he is his daughter's classmate, he decides to take him home. Little by little, Michael will become part of the family. Sandra Bullock won an Oscar for best actress for her performance and the film was a success at the American box office.

programme.title: Mystery at the Florist: A suspicious burial
programme.desc: When a body appears at her cousin's wedding, a former lawyer florist sets out to investigate a crime that hides family secrets and unexpected dangers.

programme.title: Son of a Gun
programme.desc: Young JR is accused and imprisoned for a minor crime. When he enters prison he discovers the harshness of life in prison, but he will soon become the protégé of Brendan Lynch, one of the most dangerous prisoners in Australia. However, that protection will have a price and Lynch, along with his team, will have plans for JR when he is released from prison: help them with their escape plan.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2: El poder de Electro
programme.desc: Peter Parker leads a very busy life: he has to save the city from bad guys and also continue with his university life to take care of Gwen, although from a distance. Things get complicated when the villain Electro appears with a thirst for revenge. However, it won't be the only thing Peter has to face, as the return of an old friend, Harry Osborn, brings new clues about his past.

programme.title: A town called Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Harry Dalton (Pierce Brosnan) is one of the most renowned volcanologists at the United States Geological Survey. Four years after his partner's death during a volcanic eruption in Colombia, Harry receives a call from his boss, Paul Dyfrus (Charles Hallahan), to discuss the unusual behavior of a hitherto dormant volcano. Meanwhile, the city of Dante's Peak, located on one of the volcano's plains, is celebrating being named the second most desired place to live in the country. Harry begins his investigation in the area and discovers clear signs that the volcano could soon erupt. The scientist wants to put the city on alert, but the inhabitants have economic interests that could be harmed if they heed Harry's warnings. Everyone ignores it until it's too late. The director, Roger Donaldson, was drawn to the project because he was once a geology student. Many of the film's special effects were done practically. The ash from the volcano was actually very fine shavings of newspaper. According to an interview with Donaldson, the camera that Harry Dalton uses during his investigation is actually owned by Pierce Brosnan. Initially the main role was going to be played by Michael Douglas. Most of the film's exteriors were shot in Wallas, Idaho. It was also filmed on Dante's Peak, adding certain details with digital technology.

programme.title: Crank: High voltage
programme.desc: Hitman Chelios faces off against a Chinese gangster who has stolen his virtually indestructible heart and replaced it with a sophisticated battery-powered device that requires frequent bursts of electricity to continue functioning.

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: Dr. Franks is a prestigious neurosurgeon who is going to carry out a unique and very dangerous operation: implant the memories, secrets and abilities of CIA agent Bill Pope who has just died in the mind of another person. This is a cutting-edge method that is presented as the only way the agency has to recover confidential information of vital importance from Pope's memory that compromises the national security of the United States. The problem is that the only candidate to become the vessel of the deceased's mind is Jericho Stewart, a dangerous and unpredictable convict who is on death row awaiting execution and who has a brain abnormality that makes him perfect for the mission. However, no one can assure that the result is the most effective way to stop a terrible conspiracy that is hanging over the country.

programme.title: Llamaradas
programme.desc: He was a child when he witnessed the death of his father in an act of service during a fire. Twenty years later, Brian is also a firefighter in Chicago. He is in a difficult trial period led by his brother Stephen who is very demanding of him. Both brothers will try to overcome disputes and memories of the past while an arsonist sets fires in the city.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla is the remake of a 1954 Japanese film called Goiira. In this remake, the film focuses heavily on the people affected by the case, not just the beast. Dr. Nick Tatopoulos is sent to Panama with a group of soldiers to investigate the causes of the destruction of a Japanese ship in the Pacific. There he finds remains of the skin of an animal unknown in the world of science and they believe that they are a mutation resulting from nuclear tests& The giant lizard, whose appearance in this American remake is far from the original Japanese appearance, crosses the ocean and heads to New York, there, in addition to frightening society and causing serious damage, it is attacked by the military forces with missiles from helicopters among other methods, but the beast seems implacable. The effects necessary to give the animal realism cost around 50 million dollars. The film had a total cost of 120 million dollars. Nick, thanks to a blood sample that he managed to take from the animal, discovers that it is a hermaphrodite that collects food for himself and his offspring& This complicates things& The event is followed worldwide and Audrey Timmonds, ex-wife of scientist Nick, steals a video tape from Panama to benefit her journalistic career, which will simultaneously bring serious problems for Nick. This film is just one of the many works that came from the original Japanese idea, whose mark is present in video games, comics or animated series.

programme.title: I continue like God
programme.desc: Popular Buffalo reporter Evan Baxter has just become a congressman, so he moves with his family to a luxurious development in Huntsville, Virginia. Everything seems to be going well for the Baxter family, who are focused on adjusting to their new luxury-filled life away from their hometown. Evan is expectant since in his first days as a congressman, the powerful Congressman Long proposes that he work together with his team in the development of a bill, which makes him think that God has heard his prayers and that professional success has finally knocked on his door. However, Evan's future begins to falter when one day a man who calls himself God appears at his house and entrusts him with an important mission of biblical proportions: build an ark to save a pair of each animal species and thus save humanity from the approaching universal flood. Even though Evan is skeptical and considers the man crazy, when pairs of all kinds of animals begin to arrive in his garden and different suppliers begin to knock on his door bringing enormous quantities of wood and other materials, Evan is forced to believe in God and forcibly accept the order. Resigned and with the help of his three children and the manual 'Build Arks for Dummies', Evan begins his important task. During the process, many will consider Evan crazy and begin to call him 'The Noah of New York' as he will undergo a significant transformation, both physically and mentally.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Becky Fuller, an energetic TV producer, is fired from her job, her professional life becomes as bleak as her love life. To move forward with his career, he must face a new challenge: launching a morning magazine show on a New York channel.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer is a top secret government agent with a license to kill who decides to quit his job when he finds and marries the woman of his dreams. But happiness is short-lived, since they have put a price on his head. He doesn't know who is after him, but he knows that there are several murderers and that it could be anyone. His neighbors, his friends, former colleagues, his current co-workers... Spencer will team up with his wife to find out who the mysterious characters are who want him dead before the bullies finish them off... and their marriage!

programme.title: Tech Now
programme.desc: Andrew Rogers visits a former quarry where new tech is being tested to help people stay underwater for longer. Joe Tidy reports on a huge U-turn for big tech as Instagram stops end-to-end encryption. Franchesca Hashemi explains what you need to know about the lithium-ion batteries in the tech you use every day. And Nick Kwek meets the tech entrepreneur trying to decode animal language.

programme.title: AI Decoded
programme.desc: As governments and businesses confront their reliance on US tech giants, AI Decoded explores whether Britain can build its own AI future - and how quickly it must act. Now, a sudden decision from Washington is sending shockwaves through the global AI industry, restricting access to some of America's most advanced systems - even for its allies. For UK companies, it raises a stark question: what happens when the technology you depend on is no longer available? Presenter Marc Cieslak is joined by Yang Li of East London startup Cosine, now racing to build a 'sovereign' British alternative as demand surges following the US clampdown. Bloomberg's Katrina Manson also joins to unpack the national security stakes, alongside co-host Stephanie Hare.

Gold Teeth Girl Love
programme.desc: Kisah seorang perempuan muda bernama Gadis yang baru putus dengan pacarnya. Dia mengubah penampilannya yang culun dengan memakai gigi emas untuk mengejar cinta yang baru.

programme.title: Radio Kabar Buruk
programme.desc: Kisah seorang wartawan yang sering membuat marah atasannya karena lambat bekerja dan selalu ketinggalan berita. Setelah menemukan radio antik di Toko Kr. Amat, dia selalu mengetahui semua peristiwa-peristiwa penting.

programme.title: Ku Jahit Cinta Dengan Bismillah
programme.desc: Lila anak yatim yang bekerja sebagai penjahit. Saat sedang mengantarkan hasil jahitan, dia menabrak motor Robby. Sebagai ganti rugi, Lila harus berpura-pura menjadi pacarnya. Seiring waktu berjalan, tumbuh rasa cinta.

programme.title: Salon Madam : Rambut Api
programme.desc: Seorang wanita datang ke Salon Madam untuk mengecat rambutnya dan mempercantik penampilannya, tapi cantik itu luka, dan rambutnya bisa menjadi petaka membara jika tak digunakan dengan bijak.

programme.title: Toko Kr.Amat Bantal Mimpi Indah
programme.desc: Marina mendapatkan bantal mimpi indah dari toko KR. Amat. Bantal ini jika digunakan saat tidur maka waktu bisa diputar kembali. Segala sesuatu yang menyangkut masa lalu dapat terulang kembali dan apapun yang diinginkan terwujud.

programme.title: Bidadari Di Kebun Strawberry
programme.desc: Misi yang dijalankan seharusnya mudah, yaitu menaikkan penjualan strawberry, tapi ada saja yang menghalangi usahanya termasuk pria tampan yang tiba-tiba muncul.

programme.title: 7 Pusaka - Gasing Penghenti Waktu
programme.desc: Seorang penyanyi orkes melayu yang mulai kehilangan pamornya menemukan sebuah gasing bertuah yang dapat menghentikan waktu dan memakai kekuatan gasing itu untuk menghancurkan karier penyanyi baru saingannya yang cantik jelita.

programme.title: Gold Teeth Girl Love
programme.desc: Kisah seorang perempuan muda bernama Gadis yang baru putus dengan pacarnya. Dia mengubah penampilannya yang culun dengan memakai gigi emas untuk mengejar cinta yang baru.

programme.title: Kepentok Cinta Sementara
programme.desc: Arga diultimatum pihak kampus untuk melunasi biaya kuliah, Arga sama sekali tidak mempunyai uang. Beruntung ada Bonar yang bersedia meminjamkan uang, namun ada syaratnya yaitu, menjadi pacar sementara adiknya.

programme.title: Cintaku Tak Seindah FTV
programme.desc: Ada tetangga baru yang bikin Alya kepincut dengan ketampanannya. Ramzi, cowok ganteng dan keren itu bikin Alya penasaran. Alya seorang penulis FTV, kerap menulis cerita percintaan. Apakah kisah nyatanya bakal seindah cerita FTV?

programme.title: Kasih Tak Santai
programme.desc: Kemal dan Ranti sepasang kekasih yang rupawan dan trendi. Ketika Kemal berkunjung ke rumah Ranti, ayahnya dan ibu Ranti yang sama-sama sedang puber kedua, menunjukkan tanda kasmaran. Akankah ini berdampak buruk untuk Kemal?

programme.title: The Power Of Emak-Emak
programme.desc: Ibu Elis mengkhawatirkan Ira, anaknya yang pacaran dengan Andra. Ira tidak menyadari Andra itu playboy. Ibu Elis tidak setuju Ira melanjutkan hubungannya dengan Andra karena Andra sudah dua kali menabrak Ibu Elis.

programme.title: Janda Janda Jagoan
programme.desc: Maya, Anggi, dan Sindy adalah tiga perempuan jagoan yang berstatus janda. Mereka menjadi incaran penjahat. Vina, anak Anggi diculik oleh penjahat itu. Dapatkah tiga jagoan ini membebaskan Vina?

programme.title: Cinta Ditolak Disko Bertindak
programme.desc: Inilah lika-liku persahabatan Mila dan Zani, dua gadis yang berlawanan pandangan soal ramalan. Tidak hanya kekonyolan, kisah ini juga menghadirkan perjuangan keduanya meraih asmara.

programme.title: Dear Mantan
programme.desc: Vino akan melanjutkan kuliah ke luar negeri selama 4 tahun sehingga Bella menerima cinta Dirly, cowok keren dan kaya. Tiba-tiba Vino menghubungi Bella dan akan kembali ke Jakarta. Dan ternyata Dirly adalah saudara Vimo.

programme.title: Cinta Dalam Semangkok Bakwan Malang
programme.desc: Seorang gadis dan seorang lelaki bertemu dalam sebuah perjumpaan yang tidak menyenangkan di pasar, benarkah mereka takkan bertemu lagi? Atau akankah takdir berkata lain?

programme.title: Ditinju Cinta
programme.desc: Meskipun ibunya melarang, Indah tetap ingin menjadi seorang petinju. Saat sanggar tinju mengeluarkannya karena kesalahan pengisian data, Indah belajar kepada seorang rekan sesama petinju. Dan cinta tumbuh di antara mereka berdua.

programme.title: Ditinju Cinta
programme.desc: Meskipun ibunya melarang, Indah tetap ingin menjadi seorang petinju. Saat sanggar tinju mengeluarkannya karena kesalahan pengisian data, Indah belajar kepada seorang rekan sesama petinju. Dan cinta tumbuh di antara mereka berdua.

programme.title: Diary Of A Lady-Killer
programme.desc: Seorang pencinta wanita kaya menulis buku harian tentang petualangan asmaranya, tetapi semua wanita yang pernah diselingkuhinya telah dibunuh.

programme.title: The Duel Of The Century
programme.desc: Seorang anak polisi bernama Kuo menyalahkan ayahnya atas kematian sang ibu. Ia menganggur dan menghabiskan waktunya di klub malam. Suatu malam, ia menyelamatkan Mei yang hampir dirudapaksa dan mereka menjadi teman.

programme.title: Fangs Of The Cobra
programme.desc: Film thriller nan unik ini sama sekali tidak seseram judulnya, berkisah tentang seekor ular gagah berani dan berbudi luhur yang merusak perangkap, melawan tikus pemakan bayi, dan bahkan mengalahkan sejumlah geng saingan.

programme.title: Ten Tigers Of Kwang Tung
programme.desc: Ada dendam lama di antara keluarga pendukung Ching dan Ming di Kwang Tung. Beberapa tahun kemudian, putra Liang yang bernama Hsiao-hu kembali untuk membalas kematian ayahnya.

programme.title: The Adv. Of Emperor Chien Lung
programme.desc: Liu Yung berperan sebagai detektif di masa Dinasti Ching yang menyelidiki kasus korupsi di pengadilan dengan bantuan seorang pemuda cerdik. Mereka memberikan pelajaran berharga pada orang-orang korup ini.

programme.title: The Magnificent Ruffians
programme.desc: Sekelompok ahli bela diri yang menganggur mengalami nasib buruk.

programme.title: Spring Blossoms
programme.desc: Beberapa bintang wanita terbesar Shaw Brothers di tahun 1970-an tampil bersama dalam kisah tentang cinta dan orangtua yang terlampau ikut campur. Dibintangi oleh Lily Li, Shu Pei Pei dan Essie Lin Chia.

programme.title: The Bells Of Death
programme.desc: Berkisah tentang perjalanan hidup seorang pria untuk belajar pedang, lalu melaksanakan balas dendamnya pada 3 pria yang telah membunuh keluarganya dan menculik adiknya.

programme.title: The Knight Of Knights
programme.desc: Wen Su Chen, pemimpin tujuh ksatria, mengirim enam saudara angkatnya untuk menyelidiki sebuah biara. Namun, mereka dibunuh oleh seorang kepala biara yang berencana membunuh Inspektur Lin.

programme.title: The Deadly Knives
programme.desc: Yen, seorang murid seni bela diri kembali ke tempat kelahirannya untuk mempertahankan rumah keluarga dari pengusaha asal Jepang. Di sana, Yen pun menghadapi hubungan cinta yang rumit, perampokan dan pembunuh kejam.

programme.title: Hell Has No Boundary
programme.desc: Seorang polisi wanita bernama May kembali bertugas setelah mengalami hal yang tak terduga dalam perjalanan berkemah. Namun, ia justru mengalami kejadian-kejadian aneh dan terus diintai oleh maut.

programme.title: The Silver Fox
programme.desc: Lily Ho berperan sebagai pendekar pedang wanita yang ditakuti. Ia pernah menyaksikan ayahnya disiksa dan ibunya diperkosa. 18 tahun berlalu sejak peristiwa itu, ia berencana untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: The Dancing Millionairess
programme.desc: Chen Hou adalah seorang sopir yang terjebak dalam skandal salah identitas yang membawanya pada pebisnis wanita Lok Dai. Saat rumor menyebar bahwa mereka berpacaran, Lok Dai pun marah dan meminta penjelasannya.

programme.title: Five Shaolin Masters
programme.desc: Setelah Kuil Shaolin dihancurkan, lima orang siswa belajar teknik-teknik Shaolin untuk mengalahkan musuh-musuh mereka yang dipimpin oleh Ching. Namun, ada seorang 'pengkhianat' di antara mereka. Siapakah ia?

programme.title: Call To Arms
programme.desc: Kekaisaran Chin yang agresif dan berbahaya menaklukkan kerajaan Chao yang tangguh, sementara kekaisaran Wei kehabisan pahlawan-pahlawannya dan lumpuh dipimpin penguasa yang tidak tegas.

programme.title: Call To Arms
programme.desc: Kekaisaran Chin yang agresif dan berbahaya menaklukkan kerajaan Chao yang tangguh, sementara kekaisaran Wei kehabisan pahlawan-pahlawannya dan lumpuh dipimpin penguasa yang tidak tegas.

programme.title: The Shadow Boxing
programme.desc: Chan dan muridnya Fan bekerja mengangkut zombie. Saat mereka berdua melarikan diri, ternyata salah satu dari mereka sebenarnya adalah seorang pria yang sedang menyamar dan kabur dari musuh-musuhnya.

programme.title: The Golden Buddha
programme.desc: Jeanette Lin Tsui berperan sebagai James Bond wanita yang memerangi seorang penjahat kejam dalam sebuah petualangan yang sarat dengan gadis-gadis cantik, berbagai senjata rahasia dan tempat-tempat nan eksotis.

programme.title: The Yellow Muffler
programme.desc: Sutradara asal Jepang, Inoue Umetsugu, menyuguhkan dunia gemerlap dari para penghibur di klub malam dalam sebuah kisah tentang perjuangan dua kakak beradik yang diperankan oleh Irene Chen Yi Ling dan Betty Ting Pei.

programme.title: Chinatown Kid
programme.desc: Alexander Fu Sheng kabur ke San Francisco setelah dijebak atas kepemilikan narkoba. Ia membantu geng Naga Putih nan terkenal, yang dipimpin oleh Philip Kwok, dalam perang antargeng yang mengerikan, tapi ia dikhianati.

programme.title: The Kingdom And The Beauty
programme.desc: Aktris muda Linda Lin Dai tampil memukau sebagai seorang gadis desa yang menjalin hubungan gelap dengan Kaisar Cheng-Te, pria yang ia cintai seumur hidupnya.

programme.title: The 8 Diagram Pole Fighter
programme.desc: Bangsa Mongol, dengan bantuan seorang informan, menyergap keluarga Yang yang berpengaruh, para pembela dinasti. Bangsa Mongol harus memburu semua anggota keluarga Yang yang selamat agar rencana jahat mereka untuk menggulingkan dinasti tidak terbongkar.

programme.title: Asia-Pol
programme.desc: Agen Asiapol Yang Ming Xuan melacak suatu paket emas ilegal yang dikirim untuk ketua geng bernama George Eaton. Ia juga meminta bantuan seorang wanita Tiongkok yang ingin membalaskan dendam saudarinya.

programme.title: The Anonymous Heroes
programme.desc: Dua pemuda bergabung dengan kelompok pemberontak setelah Revolusi Tiongkok tahun 1911 dan tak sengaja menjadi pahlawan. Dibantu oleh seorang putri panglima perang, mereka berhasil membantu pemberontak mencuri senjata.

programme.title: The Happiest Moment
programme.desc: Dalam film horor antologi ini seorang pria tua tewas karena overdosis pil kejantanan, seorang polisi melarikan diri setelah memeras seorang PSK, dan hantu pemilik perusahaan pemakaman mengamuk.

programme.title: Brothers From The Walled City
programme.desc: Dua yatim-piatu bersaudara yang tumbuh di Kota Benteng Kowloon mengambil jalan hidup yang sangat berbeda. Chin bekerja di sebuah kabaret, sedangkan Kang terseret ke dalam dunia kelam.

programme.title: The Web Of Death
programme.desc: Demi menguasai dunia seni bela diri, Kepala Sekte Ular berusaha mendapatkan 'Five Poison Web' nan mematikan, dan menyebarkan desas-desus tentang keberadaannya. Xiong dan Kit pun ditugaskan untuk menyelidikinya.

programme.title: Shaolin Hand Lock
programme.desc: Cheng-ying dan saudarinya memasuki kehidupan Lin Hao nan kejam demi menjalankan rencana untuk membalas kematian ayah mereka dengan memanfaatkan Jurus Tangan Pengunci Shaolin yang mematikan.

programme.title: Love With The Perfect Stranger
programme.desc: Setelah putus dengan pacarnya, seorang wiraniaga Bao bertemu dengan seorang gadis kaya, Jin Jin, yang juga baru putus dengan kekasihnya. Dua orang asing yang patah hati ini pun langsung jatuh cinta dan menikah.

programme.title: The Singing Escort
programme.desc: Musik dan keajaiban dari The Singing Escort menjadi ajang untuk menampilkan daya tarik Betty Ting. Ting berperan sebagai Susan, seorang wanita muda yang bersembunyi dari ayahnya.

programme.title: The Singing Escort
programme.desc: Musik dan keajaiban dari The Singing Escort menjadi ajang untuk menampilkan daya tarik Betty Ting. Ting berperan sebagai Susan, seorang wanita muda yang bersembunyi dari ayahnya.

programme.title: The Lady Hermit
programme.desc: Lady Hermit bersembunyi selama bertahun-tahun untuk merencanakan balas dendam setelah dikalahkan oleh Black Knight nan jahat. Pendekar Tsui Ping bertekad mengalahkan Black Knight dan belajar seni bela diri darinya.

programme.title: Na Cha The Great
programme.desc: Film klasik karya Chang Cheh yang diangkat dari kisah fantasi populer ini dibintangi oleh Fu Sheng dalam perannya yang khas sebagai remaja super Na Cha, yang bereinkarnasi untuk menyelamatkan penduduk dari kaisar kejam.

programme.title: Sword Stained With Royal Blood
programme.desc: Diangkat dari novel karya Jin Yong, kekacauan terjadi ketika seorang prajurit yang tengah melarikan diri menemukan sebuah pedang, kitab sakti, peta harta karun dan sebuah pesan rahasia di atas jasad seorang guru.

programme.title: Human Lanterns
programme.desc: Zhao pernah dikalahkan oleh Long dalam suatu duel. Tujuh tahun kemudian, Long meminta Zhao membuat sebuah lentera unik atas namanya untuk memenangkan kontes lentera. Zhao pun berencana untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: Return Of The Phoenix
programme.desc: Return Of The Phoenix adalah karya besar lain dari sutradara Li Han-hsiang. Sebuah film komedi seputar peristiwa-peristiwa menjelang pernikahan putri sang perdana menteri.

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Putri seorang ahli pedang dikejar dan diracun oleh seorang ahli nan kejam saat ia membawa kembali sebuah Pedang Emas yang dicuri ke istana.

programme.title: When The Clouds Roll By
programme.desc: Seorang penderita skizofrenia menolak mempercayai jika kekasihnya yang seorang pilot telah meninggal. Ia percaya jika kematian sang kekasih hanyalah kebohongan yang diciptakan untuk mengakhiri hubungan mereka.

programme.title: The Flying Guillotine
programme.desc: Ma Teng adalah salah satu dari 'Flying Guillotine Squad', sekelompok pembunuh yang ditugaskan oleh Kaisar Yung. Saat ia mulai mempertanyakan moralitas misinya, ia menjadi buronan yang diburu oleh mantan rekan-rekannya.

programme.title: Enchanting Shadow
programme.desc: Seorang sarjana muda bermalam di sebuah kuil menyeramkan yang konon berhantu. Ia tidak percaya dengan rumor itu namun setelah menemui seorang pendekar pedang Taoisme, ia bertemu dengan sesosok hantu nan cantik.

programme.title: The Proud Youth
programme.desc: Ling Hu Chong, murid klan Huashan, ditugaskan untuk mencari penerus 'The Proud One'. Ling merasa Ying adalah orang yang tepat, tetapi ia menemukan bahwa Ying adalah putri dari pemimpin klan jahat.

programme.title: Man Of Iron
programme.desc: Chou Lian Huan sangat ahli dalam pertarungan tinju di Shanghai. Demi menyenangkan wanita bernama Chen Ju Fang, ia rela mengorbankan segalanya dan bertarung melawan putra seorang pemimpin geng di Shanghai.

programme.title: Come Drink With Me
programme.desc: Pahlawan sejati, Cheng Pei-Pei, kembali berperan sebagai pendekar pedang wanita yang bekerjasama dengan seorang pendekar pedang pria bernama Drunken Cat untuk memerangi seorang biksu Buddha yang korup.

programme.title: Marco Polo
programme.desc: Saat bertemu dengan Marco Polo sang penjelajah Italia, kaisar Mongolia Kubilai Khan dibunuh. Marco Polo pun diminta untuk memimpin pasukan guna membasmi pemberontak anti-Mongol.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: Seorang gadis muda bertemu dengan seorang novelis di sebuah bar dan langsung jatuh cinta padanya. Namun, ternyata ia malah terperangkap ke dalam jebakan yang direkayasa oleh si novelis dan mantan kekasihnya.

programme.title: Song Of The Assassins
programme.desc: Seorang pembunuh mengemban misi pertamanya sambil diam-diam menyelidiki penyebab pembantaian keluarganya beberapa tahun silam. Namun, ia malah terjerat dalam suatu konspirasi politik saat menjalankan misi.

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: Agen Wen ditugaskan untuk menyamar sebagai pedagang senjata militer di Asia Tenggara guna menemukan beberapa amunisi dan menghancurkannya. Namun, ia diserang oleh gangster tak dikenal saat menemukan amunisi tersebut.

programme.title: The Story Of My Son
programme.desc: Li Tsu-liang is newly widowed and leading an impoverished life with two young sons. He attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing track, but is subsequently entangled with the loan sharks.

programme.title: From Beijing With Love
programme.desc: Seorang mata-mata Tiongkok yang telah pensiun selama sepuluh tahun dan mencari nafkah sebagai tukang daging dikirim ke Hong Kong untuk menemukan tengkorak Tyrannosaurus rex yang dicuri.

programme.title: Young Heroes Of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: Kisah ini berlatar di Shanghai pada akhir masa Dinasti Qing, dan bercerita tentang seorang pemuda bernama Chen Zhen yang menjadi seorang pahlawan nasional usai menanggung kesulitan dan mengatasi tantangan dalam hidup.

programme.title: Royal Tramp
programme.desc: Seorang badut secara tidak sengaja direkrut oleh seorang pemimpin sekte untuk memata-matai seorang kaisar Tiongkok yang muda dan tidak berpengalaman. Segalanya tidak berjalan sesuai rencana, dan dia akhirnya bekerja untuk beberapa pihak yang saling bertentangan sambil berusaha bertahan hidup di tengah kegilaan tersebut.

programme.title: Seeding Of A Ghost
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang sopir taksi Hong Kong berubah mengerikan setelah secara tidak sengaja menabrak seorang penyihir dengan taksinya. Dia memutuskan untuk meminta bantuan penyihir tersebut untuk membalikkan kutukan kepada musuh-musuhnya dengan mengorbankan nyawanya sendiri.

programme.title: Get In The Dark
programme.desc: Nona Qiao meninggal secara tak wajar dan kepala pelayannya membayar seorang perajin untuk membuat sebuah boneka kertas. Serangkaian peristiwa nan mengerikan terjadi saat arwah Nona Qiao bangkit untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: Law Or Justice
programme.desc: Seorang model (Joey Wong) diperkosa oleh seorang fotografer (Wilson Lam). Sementara itu, ia berselisih dengan sahabatnya (Carol Cheng) karena pacarnya (Alex Man), seorang polisi.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Paman Hua adalah pensiunan agen yang memiliki toko barang antik di sebuah jalan tua. Namun, jalan itu dihancurkan secara paksa oleh Geng Naga Hijau setempat, dan membuat identitas Paman Hua tak sengaja terungkap.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Paman Hua adalah pensiunan agen yang memiliki toko barang antik di sebuah jalan tua. Namun, jalan itu dihancurkan secara paksa oleh Geng Naga Hijau setempat, dan membuat identitas Paman Hua tak sengaja terungkap.

programme.title: Fate Jealous Greed
programme.desc: Bercerita tentang seorang pria yang mendapat sepucuk surat gaib tentang prediksi kematiannya, pria lainnya tengah berduka atas kematian sang istri tercinta, serta tiga kakak beradik yang berselisih saat makan malam.

programme.title: The Monkey Is Back
programme.desc: Monyet Batu, memberikan harapan kepada seorang gadis kecil nan putus asa. Namun, Monyet Batu dikalahkan dalam pertempuran melawan Dewa Perang bermata tiga, yang membuatnya kehilangan kekuatan dan jatuh ke dunia fana.

programme.title: Behind The Yellow Line
programme.desc: Seorang pria muda yang pemalu dan pekerja kantoran, bertemu dengan seorang wanita cantik dan ambisius yang sedang mengejar karirnya, serta seorang pria lain yang ramah namun penuh rahasia. Pertemuan ini membawa mereka ke dalam perjalanan emosional yang kompleks, penuh dengan kebingungan, kesalahpahaman, dan penemuan diri.

programme.title: Women
programme.desc: Liang Pao-erh bergabung dengan Spinsters' Club yang riang ketika dia menemukan suaminya berselingkuh. Terlepas dari wajah bahagia yang ditampilkan oleh saudara perempuannya, di balik itu semua, masing-masing dari mereka diam-diam merindukan seorang pria dalam hidupnya.

programme.title: Let's Have A Baby
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah menarik tentang kerumitan dalam menciptakan anak, yang menampilkan penampilan komedi langka oleh Alex Man Chi Leung.

programme.title: Loving You
programme.desc: Seorang polisi yang pemarah dan suka main perempuan ditembak di kepala saat memburu seorang pengedar narkoba. Selama proses pemulihan, ia merenungkan kembali hidupnya dan berusaha memperbaiki pernikahannya yang hancur.

programme.title: Mr. Vampire
programme.desc: Rencana penguburan ulang seorang tetua kota berubah menjadi bencana ketika jenazah tersebut bangkit kembali menjadi vampir haus darah yang melompat-lompat, mengincar semua orang yang bertanggung jawab menggali kuburan tersebut. Seorang Pendeta Tao dan dua muridnya berusaha menghentikan teror tersebut.

programme.title: When Fortune Smiles
programme.desc: Kepala keluarga kaya meninggal dunia dan dalam wasiatnya mewariskan kekayaannya kepada putrinya. Putranya marah dan menggunakan seorang pengumpul sampah yang mirip dengan saudara perempuannya untuk mencuri kekayaan tersebut. Putra paman juga menginginkan bagian dari kekayaan itu dan memaksa seorang pencuri kecil untuk mencuri wasiat tersebut demi rencana jahatnya.

programme.title: Mr. Virgin
programme.desc: Ketika seorang pemuda mengabaikan peringatan seorang ahli feng shui dan memutuskan untuk menikah sebelum berusia 30 tahun, serangkaian kesialan mulai mengutuk hidupnya.

programme.title: Blind War
programme.desc: Mantan kapten SWAT, Dong Gu, menderita kehilangan penglihatan traumatis kala gagal menjalankan misi. Namun, musuh bebuyutannya muncul dan membuat putrinya dalam bahaya. Ia pun harus berjuang menyelamatkan putrinya.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Pergantian rezim di Leka memicu konflik di dunia hitam & putih. Polisi mengirim Zheng Zha menyusup ke geng Song Bang, tanpa tahu pihak lain sudah siap membalas dendam.

programme.title: Painted Faces
programme.desc: Sebelum memenangkan pujian dalam film laga berkat aksi-aksi mereka yang berani, para bintang ini menjalani tahun-tahun penuh darah, keringat, dan air mata saat berlatih di bawah bimbingan Master Yu yang kejam.

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Long Wei mengalami gangguan pascatrauma usai kematian istrinya. Suatu hari, ia bertemu Amy yang bekerja di perusahaan teknologi VR dan diundang untuk menguji produk baru. Ia pun menjadi petarung VR perusahaan itu.

programme.title: Fight Back To School
programme.desc: Seorang pemimpin tim SWAT dipaksa oleh kaptennya untuk menyamar sebagai siswa SMA guna mengambil kembali senjata pribadi kapten yang dicuri selama kunjungan lapangan sekolah ke kantor polisi.

programme.title: Wusong Vs Ximenqing
programme.desc: Wu Song mengetahui perselingkuhan adik iparnya dengan pria kaya bernama Ximen Qing. Song pun dijebak dan diasingkan selama setahun oleh Qing, sementara sang adik dibunuh. Bisakah ia membalas kematian saudaranya?

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: Sebuah kartel narkoba menduduki wilayah Dong Zhou. Mei Jing dari Unit Komando Wanita Thunderbolt memimpin timnya untuk menyerang markas mereka. Namun, Mei dan timnya disergap dan identitas ayah Mei terungkap.

programme.title: 36 Secrets Of Courtship
programme.desc: Tiga orang lothario bersaing untuk menjadi kepala sekolah Sekolah Pelatihan Macho Man, sebuah lembaga yang sangat non-monastik yang didedikasikan untuk jenis latihan fisik yang sangat berbeda dengan Shaolin.

programme.title: Gorgeous
programme.desc: Seorang gadis romantis pergi ke Hong Kong untuk mencari cinta sejatinya, namun justru bertemu dengan seorang petarung profesional yang baik hati, dan perlahan ia pun mulai jatuh cinta kepadanya.

programme.title: Sex Beyond The Grave
programme.desc: Seorang wanita diperkosa dan dibunuh selama Perang Dunia II. Empat puluh tahun kemudian, ia kembali untuk menghantui para penganiayanya dari Rumah Besar Tao Tao. Seorang profesor dan keluarganya pindah ke rumah itu, hanya untuk kemudian roh-roh tersebut mengambil putra mereka.

programme.title: The Grandmaster
programme.desc: Ip Man menerima sebuah tantangan bertarung dari master asal utara yang sudah tua bernama Gong Yu Tian dan berhasil memenangkannya. Namun, ia dikalahkan oleh putri sang master, Gong Er, dan jatuh cinta padanya.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: Sebuah upaya pembunuhan yang gagal di Harbin, Cina pada tahun 1909 mengubah arah sejarah. Kini dua agen JBI harus menemukan hubungan antara benda tersebut dengan sebuah artefak Korea kuno.

programme.title: Royal Tramp 2
programme.desc: Wei si badut, yang kemudian menjadi mata-mata rahasia, lalu menjadi pejabat tinggi di istana kekaisaran Tiongkok, berusaha sekuat tenaga untuk menghadapi faksi-faksi yang bertikai dan para ahli bela diri mematikan yang semuanya berebut kekuasaan.

programme.title: The Mask Of Shura Of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: Klan Black Feather nan jahat menyusup ke wilayah Master Fire Cloud dan mencuri Topeng Shura, sehingga melepaskan roh jahat nan masih bayi. Namun, Master Fire Cloud mengadopsi bayi itu untuk mencegahnya menjadi jahat.

programme.desc: Dan Snow pieces together the story of the magnificent Stone Age circle; one of the most famous and iconic monuments in the world. He reveals how modern discoveries have started to solve its many mysteries, discovering the true skill and sophistication of its builders, its remarkably advanced solar alignments, exactly where those giant 20-tonne stones came from, and how they were moved. And cutting-edge science shows how Stonehenge sat at the heart of a vast Stone Age network that brought people from right across Britain and beyond to build, celebrate and be buried here. Exec Prod: Bill Locke; Dir: Nick Gillam-Smith; History Hit

programme.desc: Seorang raja lajang mencoba untuk berhubungan kembali dengan kekasih lamanya semasa kuliah.

programme.title: The Major
programme.desc: Dalam sebuah kecelakaan mobil, seorang polisi secara tidak sengaja menewaskan seorang anak. Polisi lainnya berusaha menutup-nutupi kasus ini.

programme.title: Wedding Planner Mystery
programme.desc: Perencana pernikahan itu merencanakan 2 pernikahan untuk keluarga kaya yang sama dengan selang waktu 2 minggu. Ia juga dikejar oleh seorang pengacara dan seorang reporter. Namun kemudian terjadi dugaan pembunuhan yang diikuti oleh upaya pembunuhan lainnya. Masalah-masalah lain pun muncul. Ia pun melakukan penyelidikan.

programme.title: Wedding Planner Mystery
programme.desc: Perencana pernikahan itu merencanakan 2 pernikahan untuk keluarga kaya yang sama dengan selang waktu 2 minggu. Ia juga dikejar oleh seorang pengacara dan seorang reporter. programme.title: Nightmare Alley: Possession
programme.desc: Seorang penipu yang berusaha naik dari pekerja karnaval rendahan menjadi medium paranormal terkenal harus adu kecerdikan dengan seorang psikolog yang bertekad membongkar tipu dayanya.

programme.title: Murder On Maple Drive
programme.desc: Suatu pasangan membeli sebuah rumah di lingkungan kelas atas tempat terjadinya pembunuhan. Namun saat kejadian aneh mulai terjadi, keduanya curiga bahwa tetangga baru mereka mungkin terlibat dalam pembunuhan tersebut.

programme.title: Adventures Of Rufus
programme.desc: Scott dan Emily sedang berada di rumah nenek Scott ketika mereka tiba-tiba menemukan makhluk misterius. Mereka punya misi: dengan bantuan buku mantra kuno, mereka akan mengumpulkan beberapa bahan untuk membuat debu ajaib demi menyelamatkan dunia mereka.

programme.title: A Walk In The Woods
programme.desc: Bill Bryson pulang ke AS usai tinggal di Inggris selama 20 tahun dan memutuskan bahwa cara terbaik untuk mengenal tanah airnya adalah dengan mendaki Appalachian Trail bersama salah satu teman lamanya, Stephen Katz.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley: Possession
programme.desc: Seorang penipu yang berusaha naik dari pekerja karnaval rendahan menjadi medium paranormal terkenal harus adu kecerdikan dengan seorang psikolog yang bertekad membongkar tipu dayanya.

programme.title: Midway To Heaven
programme.desc: Sudah bertahun-tahun sejak Ned Stevens, seorang pria menawan yang sukses berkat kerja kerasnya sendiri, kehilangan istrinya, Kate, karena kanker. Namun, ia masih belum bisa melupakan kenangan tentang istrinya dan melanjutkan hidupnya. Tetapi ketika Liz membawa pulang pacar baru dari kampus, Ned mendapati dunianya yang nyaman terbalik ketika Liz mencoba mengalihkan perhatiannya kepada Carol, seorang wanita lajang menarik yang tinggal di lingkungan Ned.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley: Possession
programme.desc: Seorang penipu yang berusaha naik dari pekerja karnaval rendahan menjadi medium paranormal terkenal harus adu kecerdikan dengan seorang psikolog yang bertekad membongkar tipu dayanya.

programme.title: Forever Strong
programme.desc: Seorang pemain rugbi ditempatkan di pusat penahanan remaja, tempat ia bermain untuk tim Ragbi Dataran Tinggi dan akhirnya bermain melawan ayahnya di Kejuaraan Nasional.

programme.title: Forever Strong

programme.title: 10 Days With Dad
programme.desc: Antoine adalah Kepala SDM sebuah perusahaan besar. Ketika istrinya memutuskan untuk berlibur dan meninggalkannya dengan tanggung jawab mengasuh keempat anak mereka, ia tahu itu akan mudah.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley: Possession

programme.title: Image
programme.desc: Saat Eva, seorang jurnalis muda, memfilmkan dokumenter tentang jalanan kejam di Brussels, ia segera terlibat dalam kehidupan seorang pria muda Maroko.

programme.title: Young & Prodigious T.S. Spivet
programme.desc: Seorang ilmuwan berusia 10 tahun diam-diam meninggalkan peternakan keluarganya di Montana tempat ia tinggal bersama ayah koboi dan ibu ilmuwannya, dan melakukan perjalanan melintasi negara dengan kereta barang untuk menerima penghargaan di Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: Deadly Vendeta
programme.desc: Ketika seorang petugas pemasyarakatan ditemukan tewas di apartemennya, polisi menduga apakah seorang mantan narapidana membalas dendam padanya; tak lama kemudian, terungkap bahwa pembunuhan tersebut mungkin tidak terkait dengan pekerjaannya, setelah polisi mengungkap keterlibatan korban dalam segitiga cinta yang berbahaya.

programme.title: Death Squad
programme.desc: Ketika semua jalur komunikasi terputus dengan sebuah fasilitas penelitian ilmiah rahasia yang berlokasi di bekas laboratorium biokimia Uni Soviet, sebuah perusahaan militer swasta dibentuk untuk memasuki fasilitas tersebut guna mencari dan mengevakuasi dokter kepala.

programme.title: Born To Race
programme.desc: Danny dikirim untuk tinggal bersama ayahnya yang sudah lama tidak akur setelah terlibat dalam balapan liar di jalanan dan ditangkap lagi. Dia berteman dengan Jessica di sekolah dan bermasalah dengan mantan pacarnya yang suka ngebut dan suka mengganggu orang. Ada balapan drag dengan hadiah beasiswa sekolah balap.

programme.title: Escape And Evasion
programme.desc: Setelah rekan-rekannya tewas di Burma, seorang prajurit yang sendirian pulang ke kampung halamannya untuk mencari ketenangan. Sambil menyembunyikan rahasia kelam dan dihadapkan pada seorang jurnalis yang gigih, ia terpaksa menghadapi hantu masa lalunya untuk terakhir kalinya.

programme.title: Laugh Riot: The Misadventure

Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.

programme.title: Rumah Hantu Pasar Malam
programme.desc: Misteri pembunuhan terjadi di pasar malam desa Sumber Sari. Namun daya tarik pasar malam tersebut seakan tidak pernah berhenti menarik pengunjungnya, termasuk kelima sahabat yang sedang mengunjungi desa tersebut.

programme.title: Bunga Cinta Kasih
programme.desc: Benih asmara tumbuh di antara dua remaja beda kasta yang terpilih menjadi pengurus kelas di sekolah mereka. Namun, hubungan cinta monyet tersebut harus menghadapi rintangan berat akibat terganjal restu orang tua.

programme.title: Pantai Selatan
programme.desc: Anak dari seorang wanita yang tewas di jurang akibat dipaksa menikah, diasuh oleh ular raksasa hingga dewasa. Tumbuh menjadi gadis cantik, ia menjadi perantara kutukan maut bagi setiap pria yang berani menggodanya.

programme.title: Curi-Curi Kesempatan
programme.desc: Akibat dijahili temannya, dua pria terpaksa menyamar sebagai perempuan demi melarikan diri dengan menyusup ke rombongan tur artis. Berbagai aksi jenaka pun terjadi saat mereka mencoba mendekati gadis-gadis di rombongan itu.

programme.title: Menerjang Badai
programme.desc: Dua sahabat dari latar belakang berbeda berjuang hidup bersama hingga terjebak dalam komplotan penyelundup emas. Kisah masa lalu yang penuh liku ini kemudian diceritakan kembali kepada anak-anak mereka di masa kini.

programme.title: Sang Pencerah
programme.desc: Sepulang dari Mekah, Darwis muda mengubah namanya menjadi Ahmad Dahlan. Seorang pemuda usia 21 tahun yang gelisah atas pelaksanaan syariat Islam yang melenceng ke arah sesat, Syirik dan Bid'ah.

programme.title: Cinta Tapi Beda
programme.desc: Sepasang kekasih yang berbeda keyakinan Diana dan Cahyo. Namun saat mereka mulai mencoba melanjutkan ke jenjang yang lebih serius, orang tua mereka sangat bertentangan dengan rencana ini.

programme.title: Hat-trick

programme.title: Wandering

programme.title: Mangkujiwo

programme.title: Hantu Juga Selfie
programme.desc: Helsi meninggal karena selfie, ia meneror temen-teman semasa hidupnya ketika mereka melakukan selfie. Hal ini membuat teman-temanya ketakutan, apa lagi bukan hanya sosok Helsi yang ada dalam foto namun hantu-hantu kocak lainya

programme.title: Belahan Jiwa
programme.desc: Cerita tentang empat sahabat yang selalu setia bersama, dan ternyata mereka semua berhubungan dengan pria yang sama

programme.desc: Documentary series following model and podcaster Abbey Clancy in her dream job as she heads behind the doors of stylish and exclusive homes in the UK and Europe to meet glamorous and successful British women who share her passion for interior design - Abbey has overseen the design of her own beautiful home, and now she's knocking on the doors of other famous women to get an exclusive peek inside their homes to find out how they've each turned their house into a magnificent home. In this episode, Abbey is at home with former Sugababe Heidi Range to find out how she's turned a Victorian laundry factory into a stunning family home, and she also knocks on the door of former supermodel, racing car driver and presenter Jodie Kidd, who reveals how she's lovingly restored a 15th-century chocolate box cottage into a cosy home.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: It's the end of an era - Dan Edgar's bachelor pad, scene of some of the most infamous afterparties in Essex, is closing its doors and being relaunched in a new guise. It's now Dan and Amber's flat, and she's wasted no time in adding some female flourishes - Dan's about to swap nights on the Xbox with Diags for couples' dinner parties, but before he does, he invites the lads over to say goodbye to the flat properly. Will the boys be able to hold it together during their final farewell, and is Dan really ready to let the curtains close on the best bachelor pad of all time? Harry's had an emotional time following his breakup with Frankie - after some serious introspection, he's finally beginning to understand how his jealousy issues impact on his relationships. When Lockie - who's had his own share of relationship dramas - sees how down he is, he pulls him aside for a heart-to-heart. Can he advise Harry on how to handle his emotions, and can Harry begin to move on from the heartbreak?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. A cycle road race reaches its thrilling finale as Greg Eddon overtakes teammate Mitch McCordell to win, but Team DJM owner Des McCordell is annoyed that Greg disobeyed his team orders and rival team manager Reece Dexter is bitterly disappointed that his team lost. As Greg warms down, an unseen assailant throws him from his bike and moves in for the kill... When news comes of the murder, DS Nelson explains the situation to DCI Barnaby while race official Damien Lamerat and local organiser Mary Appleton offer their cooperation and Des outlines the stakes when he tells Barnaby that this race is a make-or-break event for the cyclists. As Barnaby and Nelson investigate, they find themselves drawn into a ruthlessly competitive world of blackmail, bribery and bloodshed where winning comes at any cost.

programme.title: Heartbeat
