programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Challis Court appears to be a serene retirement community for former police officers, but decades-old resentments still fester beneath the surface. When a resident is found murdered inside the gated estate, DCI John Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter realise the killer is likely one of their own - an ex-cop. To crack the case, the duo must reopen the files on the legendary Goldman-Forbes heist from 30 years ago, a robbery that ruined reputations and left a long shadow. With several officers from the original investigation now living at Challis, Barnaby discovers that £300,000 remains motive enough for murder.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When a petty criminal makes a deathbed confession about murdering a teenage girl, DS Ronnie Brooks has to re-open a 14-year-old case he was involved in during his drinking days. Now sober, Ronnie is shaken to the core when he has to revisit the case, which he thought he had put to bed a long time ago - not least when he is forced to question the conclusions he drew when his mind was clouded by alcohol. Did he make a serious error when he accused the girl's businessman father of her murder, or are the team wrong to believe the dying words of a drug addict? Ronnie finds himself torn between his former partner's unwavering belief that they got the right man and the mounting doubts of his current colleagues. He also begins to wonder if there may be other ghosts from his past addiction coming back to haunt him.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The team starts to investigate after an elderly janitor is found murdered in his home, but the crime has been carried out with such precision and planning that the only evidence the killer leaves is designed to lead the detectives down a series of false trails. Could such masterminding be the work of someone not in control of their own actions? The defence argues that it could - but an altogether more sinister truth is uncovered by prosecutors Jake and Alesha.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Brandon Monkford proudly introduces artist Lance Auden at the launch of his new sculpture park - the guests head into the floodlit woods and Clemmy Staples is spooked by her boyfriend Brin Dunne before discovering Brandon's body arranged on Lance's centrepiece sculpture. Kam finds a broken locket near the body at the murder scene before Barnaby speaks with the family - Brandon's wife Alexandra is shocked, but son Fabian explains that the villagers were opposed to the park and that Brin had formed a group called VASP (Villagers Against the Sculpture Park). After the family deny recognising the locket, Lance claims he got on well with Brandon but fellow artist Simeon Rowling suggests that Brandon upset some artists and critic Daniel Fargo reveals Brandon received hate mail. As Barnaby and Nelson investigate, they have to get creative if they are to crack a case where art imitates death and everything has a deeper meaning.

One key witness could turn that all around - but not without the most personal of sacrifices.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK

The day is no less busy in court for crown prosecutors Jake and Alesha. Their case goes in an unexpected direction when a defendant claims to have made a false confession while under pressure from a police officer. The team have until the end of the day to prove the allegation is untrue.

programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly country doctor and his patients in Cornwall. Louisa and Martin have their first therapy session together, but neither of them expects to be given homework - meanwhile, Louisa is surprised when Martin agrees to let schoolboy Peter Cronk do work experience at the surgery, but Morwenna is not quite so happy about it when Peter starts trying to boss her around. Elsewhere, Mrs Tishell is surprised by the return of her husband Clive - and even more so when he tells her he wants to give things another go - Bert has nowhere to live except his new camper van after losing the restaurant, and Louisa has to call Martin to help her when one of her pupils collapses during a school excursion.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly country doctor and his patients in Cornwall. When Martin reaches breaking point after being followed around by stray dog Buddy, Louisa and Morwenna persuade him to find a new home for the dog with local vet Angela Sim - however, Martin is not impressed by Angela's alternative approaches to medicine... even if it is of the veterinary kind. Meanwhile, Ruth finds out that Bert has been trying to make his own whisky - but he eventually persuades her to keep his secret - and Louisa and Martin's therapy homework results in a picnic to Martin's dismay... however, even this does not go to plan when they are interrupted by Angela and Buddy on the beach.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK

While Sam and Ronnie pursue their prime suspect, another victim is attacked in what looks to be an identical crime. However, the second victim survives and is able to identify her assailant. Then things get complicated when she and Sam fall for each other. Sam's indiscretion means that what should be a straightforward case for Jake and Alesha becomes anything but. Sam is willing to put his feelings aside for justice, but will it be enough to save his career?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Crime drama series about the police who investigate crime, and the Crown Prosecution Service who prosecute the offenders. A suicidal man kills several people when he causes a catastrophic train crash. DS Sam Casey struggles to cope after one of the young victims dies in his arms, forcing new DI Wes Leyton and DS Ronnie Brooks to keep a close eye on him. Jake Thorn is not happy when Henry Sharpe introduces him to Alesha's replacement, but before he has time to protest the team receive some shocking news.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost

programme.desc: The very first episode of the classic detective series. New York police lieutenant James Dempsey kills his corrupt partner Joey and has to lay low until the case can be further investigated - his superior O'Grady sends Dempsey to London in England as part of an exchange of officers. Chief Superintendent Spikings, the head of SI-10, is not too pleased to have a Yank forced onto his department, so he decides to couple Dempsey with his complete opposite in the form of Sergeant Harriet 'Harry' Makepeace - an upper-class English rose - on a case involving a mysterious shipment of caviar.

programme.title: Really Horror
programme.desc: Cak Lontong dan anak indigo Naomi Angelia Sea akan membahas dan membedah hal-hal horor dengan tema-tema yang seru. Kita akan buktikan bersama apakah itu nyata atau hanya gosip saja.

programme.title: Grandmother's daughter
programme.desc: Tragedi aneh terjadi di rumah EYANG SRI, bahkan Gendis, cucu Eyang mendapati sebuah teror klenik diluar nalar yang mengancam nyawa mereka.

programme.title: Waktunya Srimulat Bercyanda
programme.desc: Program Sitkom dengan Srimulat, group lawak terbesar dan terpopuler serta memiliki penggemar dari berbagai kalangan masyarakat yang menampilkan kisah-kisah lucu dan sedang menjadi topik hangat.

programme.title: Bisik Hati Lara
programme.desc: LARA sebagai anak sulung, tak punya pilihan selain harus mencari pekerjaan tambahan, demi adik satu- satunya, LENA, bisa melanjutkan SMA nya sampai lulus, sembari memastikan terapi pengobatan Ibu.

programme.title: Brata S2
programme.desc: Pembunuhan brutal terjadi di ATM kampung Sukadamai. Roni harus memimpin penyelidikan karena Brata dipindahkan ke bagian arsip. Sukadamai membawa Brata kembali ke mimpi buruk di masa lalu.

programme.title: Angling Dharma S1
programme.desc: Pertarungan Angling Dharma dan Syudawirat menyebabkan Angling Dharma terluka parah. Angling Dharma terpaksa meninggalkan Malwapati beserta para pengikutnya.

programme.title: Negeri 5 Menara
programme.desc: Negeri 5 Menara series bercerita tentang Alif, pemuda minangkabau memiliki cita-cita tinggi. Ia ingin sekolah di ITB & menjadi sosok seperti idolanya, B.J. Habibie. Sayangnya keinginan Alif tidak mendapat respon baik dari ibunya.

programme.title: Love Daddy
programme.desc: Perjuangan 3 orang ayah dalam mengasuh anak remajanya. Meski memiliki pola asuh yang berbeda, namun mereka memiliki satu kesamaan: rasa sayang dan kekhawatiran yang berlebihan terhadap anak-anaknya.

programme.title: Si Doel The Movie
programme.desc: 14 tahun sudah Sarah pergi tanpa kabar & perpisahan tidak jelas. Rindu tersimpan dalam hati Doel sudah berumah tangga dengan Zaenab. Melalui Hans, Sarah meminta Doel datang ke Amsterdam bertemu dengan Dul, anak hasil pernikahannya

programme.title: Apose

programme.title: Tiba - Tiba Berondong

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: From 2013. This week, the brand new talk show Dance Moms Chatter welcomes special guests Dance Moms Christi, Kelly and Patsy, along with celebrity blogger Nadine Rajabi and comedian Lisa Arch.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: From 2013. Part 2 of Dance Moms Chatter welcomes none other than Abby Lee Miller herself, Dance Mom Melissa, celebrity blogger Nadine Rajabi and comedian Alec Mapa.

programme.title: Spin City
programme.desc: From 1998. From 1998. Carter's plans to break up with his boxing boyfriend are stopped by Stuart, who wants free tickets to an exciting fight.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: From 2025. After a devastating fire breaks out at a surgical center, Kidd sets out to find the real cause. Molly's is organizing its first quiz night.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: From 2015. The team investigates the murder of a blogger who was dedicated to exposing corruption in the government. They discover a Navy Seal and CIA humanitarian operation with a dark secret.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: From 2022. NCIS must investigate the Secretary of the Navy when her husband claims she tried to kill him.

programme.title: Hot Yachts Miami
programme.desc: From 2023. At the Fort Lauderdale Boatshow, we meet the glamorous Katya, who mentors newcomer Vika, who has yet to make a sale.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay cleans up
programme.desc: From 2014. Join the temperamental chef Gordon Ramsay as he travels back to some of the restaurants he has helped during the season.

programme.title: Everyone loves Raymond
programme.desc: From 2003. Ray's friend Andy gets a job at a radio station, and Ray is a guest on a show. When it turns out the host doesn't like Ray, Robert is overjoyed. Finally, there's someone who doesn't like Ray.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: From 2025. Violet and Novak are thrown into a dangerous situation that quickly escalates, forcing them to rely on their instincts to protect both themselves and a vulnerable patient.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: From 2015. When a pilot dies in a crash with a fighter jet that was recently cleared for military duty, the team must determine if human error is behind it.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Set in 2022. After an unknown perpetrator wreaks havoc during an annual Thanksgiving run, the team must find the culprit in a hurry. Later, Kasie celebrates Thanksgiving with Knight at his sister's house.

programme.title: Extreme collectors
programme.desc: From 2023. Marjorie's mess leads to dangerous conditions for her husband Irv, who has recently been diagnosed with Parkinson's disease. With the help of experts, she cleans up the mess to avoid Irv having to move home.

programme.title: Charter fever
programme.desc: From 2018. Per and Bahareh go on a camel safari and a small summit trip that ends with Per crawling to the cross. Bjørge and Tove go on a romantic trip to St.Lucia and we get to know our travel companions Lars and Monsen.

programme.title: Kjartan cleans up - at home
programme.desc: From 2024. TIX is the king of frozen pizza, and believes that cooking steals time from music. But Kjartan suspects that it is actually the fear of failure that is stopping him. Can he show that cooking can be fun?

programme.title: Swedish crime stories
programme.desc: From 2025. In August 2018, a man is found with serious gunshot wounds on the outskirts of Eskilstuna. The man dies, and it turns out that the victim was previously convicted of two murders, but beyond that the police have very little to go on.

programme.title: The moment of fear
programme.desc: From 2023. What started as an innocent Halloween party ended in a bloody crime scene at Bislett in Oslo. Get the story told by the man who survived, and from the people who were present.

programme.title: Norwegian Crimean Affairs
programme.desc: From 2021. Eight-year-old Monika Sviglinskaja is found dead in her home in Sotra. The police believe it is a suicide and drop the case. But her mother remains convinced that something criminal has happened.

programme.title: Murder at My Door
programme.desc: From 2020. The story of 19-year-old Mundill Mahil, who lured a TV manager to his death in an act of revenge.

programme.title: Swedish crime stories
programme.desc: From 2022. On 20 July 2013, a woman is found unconscious at the railway station in Umeå. When help arrives, a policeman discovers a bullet in the pool of blood. Now the hunt for a murderer begins.

programme.title: Surviving a Serial Killer
programme.desc: As of 2021. Cindy Brown was married to Bobby Joe Long for five years. During that period, she was physically and emotionally abused by her husband, who later killed 10 women in Tampa Bay, Florida.

programme.title: Confessions of Octomom
programme.desc: From 2025. Natalie Suleman, known as "Octomom", shocks the world after giving birth to the world's first surviving octuplets. When her identity is leaked to the media, the family's life is changed forever.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: From 2018. The team investigates the murder of a sergeant, who was hailed as a war hero for his efforts overseas.

programme.title: Spin City
programme.desc: From 1998. From 1998. Carter's plans to break up with his boxing boyfriend are stopped by Stuart, who wants free tickets to an exciting fight.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: From 2013. After several months in Hollywood, Abby returns to the Abby Lee Dance Company and discovers that her dancers have wandered away... all except Maddie and Mackenzie.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: From 2013. In this all-new special, Abby Lee Miller gives her unique insight into this season of Dance Moms as she recaps key moments for the moms, crazy conflicts and the best dances.

programme.title: Spin City
programme.desc: From 1998. From 1998. Stacey becomes Mike's secret weapon to woo key voters, while James succumbs to the pressure of keeping Nikki and Mike's romance a secret.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: From 2025. Violet and Novak are thrown into a dangerous situation that quickly escalates, forcing them to rely on their instincts to protect both themselves and a vulnerable patient.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: From 2015. When a pilot dies in a crash with a fighter jet that was recently cleared for military duty, the team must determine if human error is behind it.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Set in 2022. After an unknown perpetrator wreaks havoc during an annual Thanksgiving run, the team must find the culprit in a hurry. Later, Kasie celebrates Thanksgiving with Knight at his sister's house.

programme.title: Hot Yachts Miami
programme.desc: From 2023. Vika allows herself to be charmed by Nick, despite her mentor Katya's warnings. Rival broker Kaile is enraged by Vika's dirty tactics, leading to a confrontation.

programme.title: 24 timer med Gordon Ramsay
programme.desc: As of 2018. Ramsay and his team make an effort to help Bella Gianna's, a family-owned Italian restaurant in Congers, New York.

programme.title: Everyone loves Raymond
programme.desc: From 2003. Robert wants to propose to Amy, but must first convince her strict parents.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: From 2025. Severide investigates a fire in an abandoned store occupied by squatters. Mouch writes an autobiography.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: From 2015. The NCIS team investigates a murder in the Navy, and wonders why the slain pilot used an unregistered drone to gather information.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: From 2022. The CIS investigates the death of a college student who was killed while running across the street - and who was connected to McGee's wife, Delilah.

programme.title: Extreme collectors
programme.desc: From 2024. A past trauma is the cause of a seemingly devoted midwife's hidden hoarding disorder.

programme.title: Charter fever
programme.desc: From 2018. Aurora and Fleur go on a trip to one of Gran Canaria's mountains: Something that is not so easy for Aurora, who has a phobia of mountains. The Trønder boys go on a fishing trip, and we meet the happy pensioners in the Breakfast Club.

programme.title: Adventurous renovation
programme.desc: From 2022. The boys go to remote Ytre Fure in Stadlandet. Here they will transform an old Swiss villa into an idyllic and practical summer house. Halvor teaches Ole to lay wallpaper, and an exciting project also takes place under the old barn.

programme.title: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: From 2011. Some teachers simply give blank grades. For example Elizabeth. She drinks and gets high, and can't wait to marry a wealthy man and quit her miserable job.

programme.title: Grosse Pointe Garden Society
programme.desc: From 2024. Brett handles shared custody with Melissa and Connor. Alice's grief over her dog affects her judgement.

programme.title: Swedish crime stories
programme.desc: From 2022. On 22 November 2019, 20-year-old Emilia Lundberg disappears without a trace from the village of Tollarp in Scania. Her body is later found in Vramsån, with 34 stab wounds. Who subjected Emilia to this wanton violence?

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: From 2021. Kate and her family are in Malta, with friends and their families. However, things quickly sour when Kate discovers a suspicious text message.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: From 2021. There is still a tense atmosphere in the villa. Izzy warns Kate to be careful when airing her suspicions about Sean. Lucy accuses Alistair of secretly taking pictures of her.

programme.title: Vampire Wars: Battle For The Universe
programme.desc: In 2210, a crew dispatched to rescue humans from a vampire attack discovers that the vampires are plotting a take-over…and getting help from a surprising source.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: In Cape Fear, Robert De Niro plays a vengeful ex-con stalking his former lawyer, played by Nick Nolte. Directed by Martin Scorsese, this suspense-filled thriller is a chilling classic remake.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: In *Pitch Black*, Vin Diesel stars as Riddick, a dangerous convict stranded on a desert planet with survivors. Facing carnivorous monsters and scorching suns, they must trust each other to survive the deadly night.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Identical twins – a musician living in New York, and a mechanic living in Hong Kong – are separated in childhood but are unexpectedly reunited years later when the musician travels to Hong Kong for a concert.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Saudara kembar identik dipisahkan sejak lahir, yang satu menjadi mekanik jalanan, dan yang lainnya menjadi konduktor konser klasik yang ternama. Akhirnya bertemu di usia dewasa, mereka disangka satu sama lain dan terjerat dalam dunia masing-masing.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 2
programme.desc: With the nation of Panem in a full scale war, Katniss confronts President Snow in the final showdown.

programme.title: Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Pt 2
programme.desc: Katniss dan tim pemberontak dari Distrik 13 bersiap untuk pertempuran terakhir yang akan menentukan nasib Panem.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Academy Award®-Nominee Sylvester Stallone stars in this explosive action-thriller that will keep you on the edge of your seat until the final, powerful frame!

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Rambo, seorang veteran Pasukan Khusus Green Beret, berhadapan dengan seorang sheriff di wilayah Pasifik Barat Laut dan Garda Nasional.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Robin Hood in Ridley Scott's epic reimagining—fighting corruption and sparking a rebellion that turns a humble outlaw into a timeless symbol of freedom.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Seorang Tentara Salib yang tangguh dalam perang dan komandan Moornya melancarkan pemberontakan yang berani terhadap mahkota Inggris yang korup.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs Evil Dead 2 (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Alur cerita semakin rumit ketika para pahlawan, Pak dan Hak, menemukan rencana mengerikan dari seorang jenius jahat bernama "DR. Magma" yang menghidupkan kembali orang mati yang jahat dan memaksa mereka melawan para biksu Shaolin yang telah menguasai seni bela diri.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, berubah drastis saat ia menjadi buronan setelah mengunjungi Rekall, sebuah perusahaan yang menanamkan memori buatan pada klien-kliennya.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: Dua sahabat, mantan biksu Shaolin, berpisah saat mereka berhadapan dengan pemberontakan yang sedang berlangsung melawan pemerintah. Yang satu ambisius dan bangkit menjadi komandan militer yang kuat, sementara temannya yang dikhianati mempelajari teknik Tai Chi yang tenang.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan stars in Dante's Peak, where a quiet town faces fiery doom from a reawakening volcano. Explosive action and suspense make this disaster thriller a must-see ride!

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1993, ahli vulkanologi USGS Harry Dalton dan rekannya yang menjadi tunangan Marianne berusaha melarikan diri dari letusan yang sedang berlangsung di Kolombia. Saat mereka keluar, sebuah bom lava menghantam atap truk, membunuh Marianne.

programme.title: Cape Fear

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: In *Waterworld*, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Es di kutub telah mencair, dan bumi ditutupi oleh air. Manusia-manusia yang tersisa pergi mengarungi lautan untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Es di kutub telah mencair, dan bumi ditutupi oleh air. Manusia-manusia yang tersisa pergi mengarungi lautan untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper, seorang tukang reparasi drone yang ditempatkan di Bumi yang telah dirusak oleh perang dengan makhluk luar angkasa, mempertanyakan identitasnya setelah menyelamatkan wanita yang terus muncul dalam mimpinya.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: In Miami Vice, undercover detectives played by Jamie Foxx and Colin Farrell navigate danger, crime, and seduction in a gritty, stylish update of the iconic TV series. Also stars Gong Li.

programme.title: Miami Vice

programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan stars in Dante's Peak, where a quiet town faces fiery doom from a reawakening volcano. Explosive action and suspense make this disaster thriller a must-see ride!

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1993, ahli vulkanologi USGS Harry Dalton dan rekannya yang menjadi tunangan Marianne berusaha melarikan diri dari letusan yang sedang berlangsung di Kolombia. Saat mereka keluar, sebuah bom lava menghantam atap truk, membunuh Marianne.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Robin Hood in Ridley Scott's epic reimagining—fighting corruption and sparking a rebellion that turns a humble outlaw into a timeless symbol of freedom.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Seorang Tentara Salib yang tangguh dalam perang dan komandan Moornya melancarkan pemberontakan yang berani terhadap mahkota Inggris yang korup.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs Evil Dead 2
programme.desc: Alur cerita semakin rumit ketika para pahlawan, Pak dan Hak, menemukan rencana mengerikan dari seorang jenius jahat bernama "DR. Magma" yang menghidupkan kembali orang mati yang jahat dan memaksa mereka melawan para biksu Shaolin yang telah menguasai seni bela diri.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Academy Award®-Nominee Sylvester Stallone stars in this explosive action-thriller that will keep you on the edge of your seat until the final, powerful frame!

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Rambo, seorang veteran Pasukan Khusus Green Beret, berhadapan dengan seorang sheriff di wilayah Pasifik Barat Laut dan Garda Nasional.

programme.title: Death Ring
programme.desc: Killers and an ex-Army agent take part in a ruthless millionaire's annual island manhunt.

programme.title: Death Ring
programme.desc: Ketika mantan agen Pasukan Khusus Matt Collins memenangkan kompetisi bertahan hidup, ia menjadi "manusia terkuat di dunia" - sasaran empuk bagi jutawan bejat Danton Vachs, yang perburuan tahunannya menarik para pembunuh paling kejam di dunia.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: Dua sahabat, mantan biksu Shaolin, berpisah saat mereka berhadapan dengan pemberontakan yang sedang berlangsung melawan pemerintah. Yang satu ambisius dan bangkit menjadi komandan militer yang kuat, sementara temannya yang dikhianati mempelajari teknik Tai Chi yang tenang.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, berubah drastis saat ia menjadi buronan setelah mengunjungi Rekall, sebuah perusahaan yang menanamkan memori buatan pada klien-kliennya.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: In *Pitch Black*, Vin Diesel stars as Riddick, a dangerous convict stranded on a desert planet with survivors. Facing carnivorous monsters and scorching suns, they must trust each other to survive the deadly night.

programme.title: Pitch Black (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Sebuah kapal pengangkut jatuh dan meninggalkan awaknya terdampar di planet gurun yang dihuni oleh makhluk-makhluk haus darah yang muncul saat gerhana.

programme.title: Doomsday
programme.desc: In Doomsday, a deadly virus resurfaces decades after quarantine. As chaos erupts, a team enters the walled-off zone to find a cure. Action-packed and gritty, it's a battle for survival.

programme.title: Doomsday (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Sebuah film thriller aksi futuristik di mana sebuah tim bekerja untuk mencegah bencana yang mengancam masa depan umat manusia.

programme.title: Death Ring

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: Moiraine and Lan lead the four villagers to safety, unsure which is the one from the prophecy. But the friends are equally unsure about their rescuers, especially once they see how far Moiraine is willing to go for her mission - and how far astray Lan is willing to lead them.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: Moiraine and Lan find help in an unexpected - and unwanted - quarter, as the separated villagers try to find their way back to each other, or at least to refuge. But they all soon learn how far the Dark One's reach extends, and how few they can trust on the road.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time

programme.title: My Lovely Angel
programme.desc: Seorang pria secara tak terduga harus bertanggung jawab untuk merawat seorang gadis buta dan tuli. Namun, hal ini ternyata mengubah hidup mereka berdua.

programme.title: The Ugly
programme.desc: Im Dong-hwan menemukan jasad ibunya yang hilang setelah empat puluh tahun. Bertekad untuk menemukan kebenaran di balik hilangnya ibunya, ia memulai perjalanan yang mengerikan untuk mengungkap rahasia kelam keluarganya.

programme.title: Streaming
programme.desc: Mengikuti seorang streamer misteri dengan jumlah pelanggan terbanyak, yang menyiarkan proses mengungkap petunjuk kasus pembunuhan berantai yang belum terpecahkan secara langsung.

programme.title: The Ghost Game (TVN Movies)
programme.desc: Sebuah film horor misteri yang menggambarkan apa yang terjadi ketika Ja-yeong, yang memiliki rahasia dari masa lalunya, dan teman-teman sekolahnya melakukan ritual nekromansi untuk memanggil hantu.

programme.title: The Woman In The White Car (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Setelah penusukan, Do Kyung membawa saudara perempuannya yang tak sadarkan diri ke rumah sakit. Penyelidikan polisi mengungkap identitas palsu dan hubungan mengejutkan.

programme.title: Hopeless
programme.desc: Seorang remaja ingin melarikan diri dari kampung halamannya di mana kekerasan sering terjadi di antara tetangga. Karena putus asa membutuhkan uang, ia bergabung dengan sebuah geng untuk membantu keluarganya. Hidup barunya mulai terjebak dalam situasi yang semakin berbahaya saat ia berjuang untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Love Reset
programme.desc: Sepasang suami istri yang menerima penyelesaian perceraian kehilangan ingatan mereka karena sebuah kecelakaan. Mereka jatuh cinta lagi, sehingga keluarga mereka berusaha mengembalikan ingatan mereka untuk menyelesaikan perceraian.

programme.title: New World
programme.desc: Kang, kepala kepolisian, memerintahkan polisi yang menyamar, Ja-Seoung, untuk berpartisipasi dalam proyek Dunia Baru. Namun, Ja-Seoung harus memilih antara mengikuti perintah Kang atau tetap setia kepada Jeong Cheong.

programme.title: Secret: Untold Melody
programme.desc: Kisah seorang pianis yang kariernya terhenti karena cedera. Di sekolah musik di Korea, ia jatuh cinta pada seorang wanita misterius yang menginspirasinya untuk menekuni musik lagi, mengungkap rahasia yang dapat membelokkan waktu.

programme.title: Secret: Untold Melody

programme.title: Single In Seoul
programme.desc: Yeong-Ho adalah seorang pemengaruh terkenal yang mengagungkan kehidupan lajang. Hyeon-Jin adalah seorang editor yang sangat ingin menemukan pasangan. Keduanya bertemu saat bekerja bersama untuk sebuah buku.

programme.title: Hitman 2
programme.desc: Setelah musim pertama yang sukses, Webtoon "Agent Jun" akan memulai musim keduanya.

programme.title: Train To Busan (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Saat virus-zombie melanda Korea Selatan, para penumpang termasuk seorang ayah dan putrinya, pasangan saumi istri, dan beberapa siswa berjuang untuk bertahan hidup dalam kereta api dari Seoul ke Busan.

programme.title: Harbin (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Mengikuti aktivis kemerdekaan Korea yang melancarkan serangan berani di Harbin melawan Jepang untuk mendapatkan kemerdekaan negara mereka.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Film ini mengikuti para penjahat berbahaya di atas kapal kargo yang diangkut dari Filipina ke Korea Selatan, saat mereka melepaskan kekuatan jahat setelah upaya melarikan diri menyebabkan kerusuhan.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Seorang penagih utang menderita kanker hati dan harus mendapatkan transplantasi hati dalam sepuluh hari. Seorang penipu bersedia mendonorkan hatinya jika ia bisa melacak pria yang memasukkannya ke dalam penjara.

programme.title: Peninsula
programme.desc: Berlatar belakang 4 tahun setelah film "Train To Busan." Masyarakat di semenanjung Korea Selatan yang selamat dari kehancuran, berjuang untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.desc: Saat sekelompok teroris mengancam akan menyerang Mumbai, kepala ATS Sooryavanshi memulai misi untuk memburu 600 kg RDX yang hilang dan para pelaku yang bersekongkol.

programme.title: Jabariya Jodi
programme.desc: Abhay menculik para pengantin pria yang menuntut mahar dan kemudian menikahkan mereka. Namun, pertemuannya dengan Babli, kekasih masa kecilnya, mengubah prioritasnya.

programme.title: Holiday: A Soldier Is Never...
programme.desc: Seorang perwira militer berupaya memburu seorang teroris, menghancurkan geng teroris, dan menonaktifkan sel-sel tidur di bawah komandonya.

programme.title: God Tussi Great Ho
programme.desc: Menayangkan sejumlah kisah nan lucu saat Tuhan memberi kesempatan kepada Arun untuk memerintah bumi selama beberapa hari usai mereka bertemu.

programme.title: Taisha
programme.desc: Rohan dan sahabatnya, Sunny, mempersiapkan perayaan pernikahan adik laki-lakinya. Namun, pertemuan yang tak sengaja antara Rohan dan Kuljinder, seorang gembong kriminal, memicu kekerasan selama acara tersebut.

programme.title: God Tussi Great Ho
programme.desc: Menayangkan sejumlah kisah nan lucu saat Tuhan memberi kesempatan kepada Arun untuk memerintah bumi selama beberapa hari usai mereka bertemu.

programme.title: Taisha
programme.desc: Rohan dan sahabatnya, Sunny, mempersiapkan perayaan pernikahan adik laki-lakinya. Namun, pertemuan yang tak sengaja antara Rohan dan Kuljinder, seorang gembong kriminal, memicu kekerasan selama acara tersebut.

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Today we are at the DTM show event in Munich in the Olympiahalle. A mega event and battle between the Audi and Mercedes brands. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Geneva International Motor Show is traditionally the first European car show of the year and is one of the 5 most important car shows in the world! New generations, top models, vehicles with electric or alternative drives, manufacturers of almost all car brands show new products and cars that you will see on the streets tomorrow. Perfect Ride shows the highlights. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. 5.7 liter displacement, 345 hp, 6 seconds from zero to one hundred and a top speed of 274 km/h - the Corvette C5 was the most brutal monster on America's roads at the time. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Our mechanic guys also urgently need help - the lowrider star is still hanging around tired on the tow truck, even though he's about to dance. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: For the showreel, the stunt heroes at action concept film an epic body fight between law enforcement officers and outlaws on the run - and the full program: severe beatings in close combat, glass bottles burst on heads, bodies fly through walls. Finally, the gangster car flies over 15 meters high, detonates in the air and leaves a trail of destruction behind. Full double action in one episode. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this Top Speed ​​episode, presenter Martin Utberg is invited by the art expert Detlev Kümmel, known from the popular TV show Bares for Rares. Also there are classic car owner Lars Wygoda and artist Jakob Reh, who portrays Lars' Volkswagen Beetle from 1972 in a special way under the attentive eyes of Kümmel. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: From racetrack legends to sporty luxury road cruisers: no automobile manufacturer manages the balancing act between driving pleasure and comfort as well as BMW. With 550 hp and lightweight construction, the M4 CSL is a race track icon. We test it and show its story. What does the BMW M760e stand for? The power says driver's sedan! The luxurious furnishings speak for danger. We'll find out. (Station info).

programme.title: Chevrolet Detroit GP, Streets of Detroit, Michigan
programme.sub-title: Chevrolet Detroit GP, Streets of Detroit, Michigan

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: The Range Rover Velar – The vehicle is a milestone for the traditional British company Land Rover. It takes the mid-size SUV segment to a whole new level of luxury. Extendable door handles and laser lights are just two of the many technical highlights. MOTORVISION TV accompanies the creation of the Velar and shows English craftsmanship paired with modern mass production. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Autonomous driving, the Internet of Things or artificial intelligence – technology makes it possible, but most people are afraid and anxious. In the future, will we all be slaves to technology and dependent on machines that can do everything themselves and perhaps even better than us? No fear! Part four of Grüne Welle gets you ready for the mobile future and gives you in-depth insights into the technology of tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether it's the Porsche 918 Spyder, Audi R8, Mercedes AMG GT or BMW i8, they are the fastest, most spectacular and most sought-after supercars in the world, with breathtaking speeds and incredible engine performance: German supercars not only lead the way because of their unique performance, but also set standards with their design and innovative technology. DreamCars presents the most exciting and fastest German super sports cars. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Two different horses from the same stable: Ford Consul Coupe and Mercury Cougar. Which of the two classic coupes is more fascinating, the Teutonic Consul or the Big Banger Cougar? Also: The legends return – The Silver Arrows at the Großglockner Grand Prix. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: In 2019, Porsche celebrated 70 years of sports car history. For this occasion, it was decided to recreate a completely new vehicle of the type 993 based on an existing original bodyshell - the unique "Project Gold". Also: the Q5 Sportback, Audi's mid-range SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.sub-title: Auto Union – The story of the four rings
programme.desc: It is the second largest German car manufacturer before the war, Auto Union. In 1932, the economic crisis brought the Horch, DKW, Audi and Wanderer brands together to form Auto Union. Car History tells the whole story of Auto Union, its four brands, the exciting cars and the big Grand Prix victories of the spectacular Silver Arrows in the 1930s. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: To crash or to be crashed, that is the big question at the stock car race in Herzfelde! It doesn't take much to catapult your competitors out of the race. Take a vehicle that is ready for scrap, remove the glass, small parts, back seat and passenger seat. Airbags are undesirable. A crash helmet, seat belt and roll bar are completely sufficient here. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: They don't make room in the fast lane: sporty off-road vehicles. From mini-SUVs to luxury off-road vehicles, the boom is not slowing down. In Perfect Ride we get to the bottom of it all. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: A boat with four wheels: a floating float! There are still some examples of them around and we have found the most beautiful ones for you! (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: A beautiful woman and a car radio are not enough for this event. Performance and pressure are what count in Sinsheim. Only here at the Car and Sound trade fair does the sound level become an experience. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: How do stunts work? What exactly does a stuntman do? Who are the real heroes of action films? The unique series “Stunt Heroes” on MotorvisionTV has been answering these and other questions for two years. The stunt people from Action Concept, one of the largest film and stunt productions in Europe, give a unique insight into their daily work and into what cannot be seen in the film. Weeks of preparation are often necessary for a 5-second film stunt. Backbreaking work! (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Martin Utberg visits the artist Andrew McGeachy in Thun, where he portrays an Alfa Romeo Montréal. In front of Schadau Castle, the viewer learns everything about the design and history of this iconic sports car. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Porsche now offers 27 derivatives of its cult model 911. The selection has never been so large. And it has never been possible to examine all models in one place until today! We are literally speed dating with the Porsche 911. Which variant can win the heart of Motorvision presenter Julian on a road trip through the Black Forest and the Palatinate and why? (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel information).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Crete is the largest of the Greek islands and a motorcycle paradise. Curves overlooking the sea, mountain passes up to 1200m and sensational panoramas, gorges and hospitable people. We started our day tours to experience Crete from the Robinson Club in Ierapetra. The documentary shows the most beautiful mountain roads and bays in the eastern part of the island. Our day tours led to the famous Dikti Mountains. This film also shows the Lasithi plateau, the famous Vai Beach and a tour to the former hippie village and the caves of Matala. The highlight is the ride up to the mountain village of Ethia on what is probably one of the most spectacular (station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Crete is the largest of the Greek islands and a motorcycle paradise. Curves overlooking the sea, mountain passes up to 1200m and sensational panoramas, gorges and hospitable people. We started our day tours to experience Crete from the Robinson Club in Ierapetra. The documentary shows the most beautiful mountain roads and bays in the eastern part of the island. The highlight is the ride up to the mountain village of Ethia on what is probably one of the most spectacular (station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Tenerife is not just a paradise for pensioners and winter refugees. The island also attracts adventurers who want to explore breathtaking landscapes on winding roads on their motorcycles. M-Motorradreisen has now included the unique natural backdrop with the omnipresent, 3715m high Teide, lush forests and deep blue oceans in its program for the second time. This travel documentary shows the most beautiful tours on the two Canary Islands. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.sub-title: Sweden road trip with the VW ID.7 Tour
programme.desc: Long distances and electric cars have not been friends so far. But that should change, for example with this vehicle: The VW ID.7 in the Pro S version offers a range of around 700 km and, as a tourer, also plenty of space - the perfect companion for a road trip. We drive through Sweden in the electric station wagon and check consumption, driving characteristics and comfort. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Sonsio GP, Indianapolis Motor Speedway Road Course, Indiana

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

programme.title: UIM Aquabike World Championship 2025
programme.sub-title: GP of Qatar, Ski Division, Old Doha Port
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike Class Pro World Championship starts a new action-packed season. The registered pilots promise exciting races on the water again this year. (Station info).

programme.title: P1 Class 1 Offshore Championship 2024
programme.desc: The premier class of racing boats, the Class 1 championship, starts south of Tampa in Sarasota. An exciting race with catamarans with over 1,000 hp is on the program on the west coast of Florida. Who will win? (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: We test various tricycles for big boys: First, trikes with up to 200 hp car engines in the rear and the three-wheeled MP3 scooter from Piaggio, which has more grip than any other scooter with two front tires. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: The Thomathal on the Katschberg in Austria - there is still calm here in the morning. The sun is shining, the ice is glittering. But the calm is over as soon as Danny Pfeil's European Speedclub begins winter driving training. Every January, an ordinary meadow is transformed into a treacherous course of ice and snow. Everyone can push their limits here for three weeks a year. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: The new Bentley Continental GT. It is the successful model of the English luxury brand. Nevertheless, the British have been making losses in recent years. The new car must be a success in order to return Bentley to its former strength. This makes the development of the new Continental a particularly large, mammoth task. Made in England shows the development of the new GT and whether the luxury athlete also convinces racing legend Derek Bell. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.sub-title: Sustainability in mobility 1: Optimized combustion engines
programme.desc: Combustion engines have ensured our progress for 125 years. With the price of harmful emissions. In addition, the world population continues to grow and more and more cars are being sold. But this will only work for our earth/environment in the long term if vehicle emissions are drastically reduced at the same time. Green Wave – Sustainability in mobility shows developments as to how manufacturers want to further reduce the consumption of their vehicles in the future. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the classic coupes, the English sports cars, cars as cool as James Bond. Aston Martin, Bentley and Jaguar build the most exclusive and elegant coupes in the world. Their inimitable design is still inspired today by the iconic Jaguar E-Type and Aston Martin DB5. Dream Cars presents the most exclusive and expensive English coupes. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: He has a famous name and should heat up the Ferraris on the race track. The Bizzarrini GT 5300 from 1965. Giotto Bizzarrini, the creator of the famous Ferrari GTO, wanted to use this car to return the favor to his former employer Enzo Ferrari, because the employment relationship ended in a dispute. But the Italian super sports car with the American V8 heart failed spectacularly. Today, however, the Bizzarrini 5300 GT is a sought-after collector's item and is often more expensive than a Ferrari. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.sub-title: Mercedes – The comeback of the Silver Arrows
programme.desc: Whether gullwing, streamlined or monoposto – after the war, silver quickly became the color of the winners again. In the slipstream of their own myth, the second generation Silver Arrows also drive from victory to victory and give Mercedes golden years in racing. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Miriam Höller visits hot events and cool challenges in the motor world for Motorvision TV. In the first episode she reports on the "Night of the Jumps" in the Munich Olympic Hall. The event is part of the Night of the Jumps Tour, the official FIM World Motocross Championship. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: One of the top topics in this episode of Perfect Ride: topless models. With them, every adventure starts with a thrill: Spyder, Speedster, Roadster – in short: convertibles. Free driving and feeling of life in all variations (channel information).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. In 1997 Ferrari celebrated the company's 50th birthday. At that time, Wolfgang Rother followed the Ferrari myth and collected his first driving impressions with the Ferrari 550 Maranello. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Rollovers, ramp jumps, crashes – there are 1000 ways to destroy cars. They all know the Stunt Heroes! The report looks back at the car highlights of the last few months. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top speed presenter Martin Utberg and his teammate Jonas Lach are taking part in the Planai Classic, one of the few remaining real winter rallies in Europe. You start with an Austin Seven from 1932. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: English luxury and German lifestyle. With an extended wheelbase, the Bentley Bentayga focuses on its rear passengers and pampers them with flawless workmanship and a champagne cooler. In the Mercedes CLE 53, however, the best place is behind the steering wheel. Mercedes wants to arouse emotions again with a 3-liter in-line six-cylinder engine. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM Aquabike World Championship 2025
programme.sub-title: GP of Qatar, Ski Division, Old Doha Port

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: In the seventies and eighties, automobile production boomed and with it automobile advertising. Television advertising for cars is gaining momentum. Even the oil crisis cannot stop global automobile production or car advertising. The spots are becoming more and more imaginative and entertaining. Ultimately, automobile advertising is developing into its own cinematic medium, produced at a high quality and expensively. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes the audience to the Klassikwelt Bodensee in Friedrichshafen, an event that is much more than a classic car fair. In addition to vintage and youngtimers, visitors can expect a varied program with demonstration drives of historic racing cars, an air show, a historic paddock and numerous encounters with collectors, racing drivers and enthusiasts. Top Speed ​​discovers why the Klassikwelt Bodensee is one of the most diverse classical events in Europe. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Mercedes-Benz is the most successful automobile brand in motorsport. From the world's first car race in 1894 to today's Formula 1, Mercedes has been winning races all over the world for over 120 years. Whether Panamericana or Le Mans, DTM or Indianapolis, Silver Arrows or Formula 1, no other manufacturer has won as many races as Mercedes. The Mercedes racing drivers are always the greatest and most famous drivers of their time like Rudolf Carracciola, Juan Manuel Fangio or Lewis Hamilton. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Classic cars and everything that goes with them: events, racing, portraits, mechanic tips and the most beautiful pictures from the automobile archives from all over the world. The most beautiful oldies, the hottest racing cars from bygone eras. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. The Audi quattro, also called Urquattro, is a sports coupe from the Audi brand that was manufactured for a good ten years starting in 1980. The Urquattro is part of the success story of Audi's quattro drive in sports and road vehicles. Reporter Maximilian Engert presents the vehicle. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.desc: The Monaco Grand Prix was neither the first Grand Prix in motorsport history nor the first race to be held on a road circuit. Nevertheless, the event has achieved cult status since its premiere in 1929. No race is as intertwined with racing history as the Monaco Grand Prix. MOTORVISION TV tells the story of this legendary race. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: Today in Classic Races we are showing what is probably the best description and representation of the four-wheel drive system newly developed by Audi from 1980 onwards. With fascinating and exciting images from various rallies, legendary drivers and great scenes from the rally world. (Station info).

programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. At that time, Wolfgang Rother followed the Ferrari myth and collected his first driving impressions with the Ferrari 550 Maranello. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: One of the top topics in this episode of Perfect Ride: topless models. With them, every adventure starts with a thrill: Spyder, Speedster, Roadster – in short: convertibles. Free driving and feeling of life in all variations (channel information).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Rollovers, ramp jumps, crashes – there are 1000 ways to destroy cars. They all know the Stunt Heroes! The report looks back at the car highlights of the last few months. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top speed presenter Martin Utberg and his teammate Jonas Lach are taking part in the Planai Classic, one of the few remaining real winter rallies in Europe. You start with an Austin Seven from 1932. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: English luxury and German lifestyle. With an extended wheelbase, the Bentley Bentayga focuses on its rear passengers and pampers them with flawless workmanship and a champagne cooler. In the Mercedes CLE 53, however, the best place is behind the steering wheel. Mercedes wants to arouse emotions again with a 3-liter in-line six-cylinder engine. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Carbon fiber on motorcycles – does that make sense? Carbon: The fabric structure of the magical material from Formula 1 shimmers with high quality. Highly priced, but ultra stable and ultra light and therefore extremely attractive for racing and street motorcycles. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Fascination Australia. Red deserts, mystical sounds and endless expanses. Traveling through the outback by car has always been the dream of 25-year-old student Lena Kwasow. She is a passionate driver and self-confessed Mini fan and wants to drive across the Northern Territory for 10 days. From Alice Springs to Ayers Rock in a Mini over almost 500 km of dusty roads, Lena will encounter fascinating wildlife and breathtaking nature. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Chevrolet Detroit GP, Streets of Detroit, Michigan

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Maybach – the finest car manufacturer from Germany. Each model is made entirely by hand. An outstanding vehicle, the absolute pinnacle of driving comfort, timeless aesthetics and workmanship. A Maybach is considered the measure of all things modern automotive technology. These vehicles were forgotten for over 60 years - until Mercedes-Benz revived the luxury brand in 2002. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Over 500 hp, but no CO2 emissions or fuel consumption? The reality of virtual design -- A new type of battery promises to revolutionize electromobility. -- The cars of the future will steer and react independently: autonomous driving. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Jaguar, Rolls Royce or Bentley, Aston Martin or McLaren, Dream Cars - England shows the most exciting, beautiful and fastest dream cars from Great Britain. Whether luxury sedan, coupe or super sports car, the cars from England combine tradition with exclusive luxury, exceptional performance and unique British flair. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: The sporting legacy of Henry Ford
programme.desc: Henry Ford would have been 150 years old in 2013. The successful American entrepreneur became known for introducing the assembly line in automobile production. In this program, Classic Ride deals with three models that can certainly be described as an important part of its sporting heritage: Ford Thunderbird (1955), Ford Mustang (1964) and Ford Capri (1968). (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: With high-quality vehicles and a focus on hybrid and electric drives, Volvo offshoot Polestar is developing into a serious competitor to Tesla. Also: Hyundai is taking a different approach with the Nexo and is devoting itself to fuel cell technology. And: the Volkswagen Golf GTE and two other VW hybrid models in comparison. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Racing has been Ford's engine for over 100 years: Henry Ford won his first race with his first car. Thousands more victories are to follow as Ford writes motorsport history: the GT40 in Le Mans, the Capri on the circuit and the Escort in the Monte Carlos Rally and the Safari Rally. Ford professionalizes rallying, wins the Indianapolis 500 and builds the most successful engine in Formula 1, the Ford-Cosworth. Steering wheel geniuses like Jim Clark, Jackie Stewart and Carlos Sainz sit in the cockpit. Car History shows Ford's entire motorsport history, with exciting pictures from the wild (channel info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: And only here does the largest motorsport spectacle in the world take place. 210 racing cars, more than 1,000 drivers and helpers, plus over 200,000 fans. The 24 hour race leaves no one indifferent. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: A very special race takes place in Saalbach Hinterglemm: The Snow Mobile Grand Prix. No expense or effort is spared at the big winter opening of the Alps. 15,000 cubic meters of snow are carted in to transform the Austrian town into a white race track for the fifth time. Here, professionals and celebrities engage in a snow battle that is second to none. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Machine versus nature. A bit of madness is part of it when off-road enthusiasts drive breakneck maneuvers in the toughest off-road trophies with 800 HP monsters. They bite the hard stone. These include the most robust vehicles. We look off the roads and find some top off-roaders. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: 40 years of Mercedes tuning: AMG CLK 63 Black Edition. Total Siberia: 7100 km, and 33 teams in the Transsyberia Rally. Audi RS 4 and Porsche 911 4S: upper class of corner robbers. The VW Tiguan in the off-road test. Hummer H3 vs Toyota FJ Cruiser: Two off-roaders in comparison. Subaru Impreza WRX and Mitsubishi Lancer EVO 9 in comparison (transmitter information).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Martial arts specialist Ramazan develops a fight choreography in which four stuntmen dressed as agents beat him up. This episode of “Stunt Heroes” answers whether he can free himself from the tricky situation and who will end up flying off spectacularly in the car. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg was invited by managing director Sven Bössow to take part in the opening of the winter festival at the Hans-Peter Porsche Traumwerk in Anger and takes the audience on a journey through time through this extraordinary museum. In this episode, Hans-Peter Porsche, grandson of Ferdinand Porsche, talks about how his dream came about. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: It is the vision of an electric future from AMG: The Concept AMG GT XX delivers an incredible 1360 hp and charges faster than you can say range anxiety. We were there for the spectacular world premiere. And: This racer looks like it came out of a retro film but is the brand new top model from Morgan. We reveal five exciting facts about this British work of art. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: Today in Classic Races we are showing what is probably the best description and representation of the four-wheel drive system newly developed by Audi from 1980 onwards. With fascinating and exciting images from various rallies, legendary drivers and great scenes from the rally world. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Mercedes-Benz is the most successful automobile brand in motorsport. From the world's first car race in 1894 to today's Formula 1, Mercedes has been winning races all over the world for over 120 years. Whether Panamericana or Le Mans, DTM or Indianapolis, Silver Arrows or Formula 1, no other manufacturer has won as many races as Mercedes. The Mercedes racing drivers are always the greatest and most famous drivers of their time like Rudolf Carracciola, Juan Manuel Fangio or Lewis Hamilton. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Classic cars and everything that goes with them: events, racing, portraits, mechanic tips and the most beautiful pictures from the automobile archives from all over the world. The most beautiful oldies, the hottest racing cars from bygone eras. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. The Audi quattro, also called Urquattro, is a sports coupe from the Audi brand that was manufactured for a good ten years starting in 1980. The Urquattro is part of the success story of Audi's quattro drive in sports and road vehicles. Reporter Maximilian Engert presents the vehicle. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: In the seventies and eighties, automobile production boomed and with it automobile advertising. Television advertising for cars is gaining momentum. Even the oil crisis cannot stop global automobile production or car advertising. The spots are becoming more and more imaginative and entertaining. Ultimately, automobile advertising is developing into its own cinematic medium, produced at a high quality and expensively. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes the audience to the Klassikwelt Bodensee in Friedrichshafen, an event that is much more than a classic car fair. In addition to vintage and youngtimers, visitors can expect a varied program with demonstration drives of historic racing cars, an air show, a historic paddock and numerous encounters with collectors, racing drivers and enthusiasts. Top Speed ​​discovers why the Klassikwelt Bodensee is one of the most diverse classical events in Europe. (Station info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Off-Road
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.desc: From the Phoenix Raceway in Avondale, Arizona, USA.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: With high-quality vehicles and a focus on hybrid and electric drives, Volvo offshoot Polestar is developing into a serious competitor to Tesla. Hyundai is also taking another, more sustainable path with the Nexo.

programme.desc: Gifting a priceless piece of artwork to a notorious island full of criminals sounds like just another one of Salvador Dalí's infamous stunts, but four decades later, someone finally got up the nerve to steal it from New York's Rikers Island.

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: S1 E7Ambulances are accompanied on their missions to help those in need across the country.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: BMW M1 MeetingEvery year, thousands of motorsport fans make the pilgrimage to the Histo-Cup Austria at the Salzburgring to admire more than 200 historic racing cars in action. We saw the first presentation of the BMW M1 Procar series since 1979 there.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S1 E14 — Horsepower Slingshot Armin Schwarz's tires burn on ice and snow in Finland. Drift until the snow watch comes. There is also an extravagant duel at CES in Vegas: Mercedes, the Warrior of the Stars versus Audi, Lord of the Rings.

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: S1 E11 — Wartburg 313The highlights of automobile history are shown: This time it's about the Wartburg 313.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!
programme.desc: S2 E11 — Lowrider, the SecondTuning is a way of life for many car fans: the search for ever more horsepower, better sound and extraordinary design. The show takes a look behind the scenes of well-known, renowned and private tuning companies.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Behind the SceneThe Stunt Heroes from Action Concept are tough professionals. They throw themselves off houses, cause cars to fly or explode. Without the necessary seriousness and constant concentration when carrying out your work, nothing works.

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: S6 E210 - 333 minutes Rally 2025Pascal Kapp's vintage car rallies are impressive due to their uniqueness. Driving fun is always the focus here. A special highlight is the 333-minute rally. It requires absolute concentration. We take a look behind the scenes.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: S1 E9 — Mansory ConquistadorThe Mansory Conquistador embodies superlative fine tuning for 750,000 euros.

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: S1 E8The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The incidents are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: S1 E22 — New Classic Big BikesClassic motorcycles are back in style. Honda is also reflecting on its great tradition and with the CB 1100 EX has revived a big bike that could have ridden on our streets in the flashy seventies.

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: S2 E14 — Episode 27People in car professions such as car salesmen and scrap dealers are followed in the show.

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.desc: Children's of Alabama Indy GP: RennenVom Barber Motorsports Park in Birmingham, Alabama, USA.

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: S2 E4 — MaybachMaybach is one of the finest car manufacturers in Germany. Each model is made entirely by hand. It is an outstanding vehicle, the absolute pinnacle of driving comfort, timeless aesthetics and workmanship.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: E25 - Trucks of the futureThe latest developments from the traditional Swedish manufacturer Volvo Trucks are examined. Professional drivers don't have it easy these days. At the same time, current trucks offer new digital features that make many things easier.

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: S2 E20 — International CoupesWith their design and powerful engines, the international coupes from Maserati, Porsche, Bentley, Mercedes and Rolls-Royce arouse more emotions than any other car. They are the epitome of elegance and exclusivity in automobile construction.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: S1 E18 — Episode 18We see what happens when ambition exceeds driving ability and racing professionals are carried out of the curve. Breathtaking stunts by professional drivers and spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed are presented.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: S1 E33 — Best of 2012The show once again presents the most beautiful stories from the past shows.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E23 — Episode 23The Fiat Panda Cross is now also available as a mild hybrid. We test the little powerhouse. We also bring a Hyundai and an extreme athlete together on a race track. And we show a driving report of the Audi e-tron GT.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S1 E31 — Car Advertising Part 2In the seventies and eighties, automobile advertising boomed, fueled by car production. The spots are becoming more and more imaginative and entertaining, but also more and more expensive to produce.

programme.title: Nordschleife
